44 namespace o2::soa

46 void accessingInvalidIndexFor(const char* getter);

52 namespace o2::soa
53 {
55 struct TableRef {
56  consteval TableRef()
57  : label_hash{0},
58  desc_hash{0},
59  origin_hash{0},
60  version{0}
61  {
62  }
63  consteval TableRef(uint32_t _label, uint32_t _desc, uint32_t _origin, uint32_t _version)
64  : label_hash{_label},
65  desc_hash{_desc},
66  origin_hash{_origin},
67  version{_version}
68  {
69  }
70  uint32_t label_hash;
71  uint32_t desc_hash;
72  uint32_t origin_hash;
73  uint32_t version;
74 
75  constexpr bool operator==(TableRef const& other) const noexcept
76  {
77  return (this->label_hash == other.label_hash) &&
78  (this->desc_hash == other.desc_hash) &&
79  (this->origin_hash == other.origin_hash) &&
80  (this->version == other.version);
81  }
82 
83  constexpr bool descriptionCompatible(TableRef const& other) const noexcept
84  {
85  return this->desc_hash == other.desc_hash;
86  }
87 
88  constexpr bool descriptionCompatible(uint32_t _desc_hash) const noexcept
89  {
90  return this->desc_hash == _desc_hash;
91  }
92 
93  constexpr TableRef(TableRef const&) = default;
94  constexpr TableRef& operator=(TableRef const&) = default;
95  constexpr TableRef(TableRef&&) = default;
96  constexpr TableRef& operator=(TableRef&&) = default;
97 };
98 
100 template <size_t N1, size_t N2, std::array<TableRef, N1> ar1, std::array<TableRef, N2> ar2>
101 consteval auto merge()
102 {
103  constexpr const int duplicates = std::ranges::count_if(ar2.begin(), ar2.end(), [&](TableRef const& a) { return std::any_of(ar1.begin(), ar1.end(), [&](TableRef const& e) { return e == a; }); });
104  std::array<TableRef, N1 + N2 - duplicates> out;
105 
106  auto pos = std::copy(ar1.begin(), ar1.end(), out.begin());
107  std::copy_if(ar2.begin(), ar2.end(), pos, [&](TableRef const& a) { return std::none_of(ar1.begin(), ar1.end(), [&](TableRef const& e) { return e == a; }); });
108  return out;
109 }
110 
111 template <size_t N1, size_t N2, std::array<TableRef, N1> ar1, std::array<TableRef, N2> ar2, typename L>
112 consteval auto merge_if(L l)
113 {
114  constexpr const int to_remove = std::ranges::count_if(ar1.begin(), ar1.end(), [&](TableRef const& a) { return !l(a); });
115  constexpr const int duplicates = std::ranges::count_if(ar2.begin(), ar2.end(), [&](TableRef const& a) { return std::any_of(ar1.begin(), ar1.end(), [&](TableRef const& e) { return e == a; }) || !l(a); });
116  std::array<TableRef, N1 + N2 - duplicates - to_remove> out;
117 
118  auto pos = std::copy_if(ar1.begin(), ar1.end(), out.begin(), [&](TableRef const& a) { return l(a); });
119  std::copy_if(ar2.begin(), ar2.end(), pos, [&](TableRef const& a) { return std::none_of(ar1.begin(), ar1.end(), [&](TableRef const& e) { return e == a; }) && l(a); });
120  return out;
121 }
122 
123 template <size_t N, std::array<TableRef, N> ar, typename L>
124 consteval auto remove_if(L l)
125 {
126  constexpr const int to_remove = std::ranges::count_if(ar.begin(), ar.end(), [&l](TableRef const& e) { return l(e); });
127  std::array<TableRef, N - to_remove> out;
128  std::copy_if(ar.begin(), ar.end(), out.begin(), [&l](TableRef const& e) { return !l(e); });
129  return out;
130 }
131 
132 template <size_t N1, size_t N2, std::array<TableRef, N1> ar1, std::array<TableRef, N2> ar2>
133 consteval auto intersect()
134 {
135  constexpr const int duplicates = std::ranges::count_if(ar2.begin(), ar2.end(), [&](TableRef const& a) { return std::any_of(ar1.begin(), ar1.end(), [&](TableRef const& e) { return e == a; }); });
136  std::array<TableRef, duplicates> out;
137  std::copy_if(ar1.begin(), ar1.end(), out.begin(), [](TableRef const& a) { return std::find(ar2.begin(), ar2.end(), a) != ar2.end(); });
138  return out;
139 }
140 
141 template <typename T, typename... Ts>
142 consteval auto mergeOriginals()
143  requires(sizeof...(Ts) == 1)
144 {
145  using T1 = framework::pack_head_t<framework::pack<Ts...>>;
146  return merge<T::originals.size(), T1::originals.size(), T::originals, T1::originals>();
147 }
148 
149 template <typename T, typename... Ts>
150 consteval auto mergeOriginals()
151  requires(sizeof...(Ts) > 1)
152 {
153  constexpr auto tail = mergeOriginals<Ts...>();
154  return merge<T::originals.size(), tail.size(), T::originals, tail>();
155 }
156 
157 template <typename T, typename... Ts>
158  requires(sizeof...(Ts) == 1)
159 consteval auto intersectOriginals()
160 {
161  using T1 = framework::pack_head_t<framework::pack<Ts...>>;
162  return intersect<T::originals.size(), T1::originals.size(), T::originals, T1::originals>();
163 }
164 
165 template <typename T, typename... Ts>
166  requires(sizeof...(Ts) > 1)
167 consteval auto intersectOriginals()
168 {
169  constexpr auto tail = intersectOriginals<Ts...>();
170  return intersect<T::originals.size(), tail.size(), T::originals, tail>();
171 }
172 } // namespace o2::soa
173 
174 namespace o2::soa
175 {
176 template <typename T>
177 concept not_void = requires { !std::same_as<T, void>; };
178 
180 template <typename C>
181 concept is_persistent_column = requires(C c) { c.mColumnIterator; };
182 
183 template <typename C>
184 constexpr bool is_persistent_v = is_persistent_column<C>;
185 
186 template <typename C>
187 using is_persistent_column_t = std::conditional_t<is_persistent_column<C>, std::true_type, std::false_type>;
188 
189 template <typename C>
190 concept is_self_index_column = not_void<typename C::self_index_t> && std::same_as<typename C::self_index_t, std::true_type>;
191 
192 template <typename C>
193 concept is_index_column = !is_self_index_column<C> && (requires { &C::getId; } || requires { &C::getIds; });
194 
195 template <typename C>
196 using is_external_index_t = typename std::conditional_t<is_index_column<C>, std::true_type, std::false_type>;
197 
198 template <typename C>
199 using is_self_index_t = typename std::conditional_t<is_self_index_column<C>, std::true_type, std::false_type>;
200 } // namespace o2::soa
201 
202 namespace o2::aod
203 {
205 template <typename D, typename... Cs>
206 struct TableMetadata {
207  using columns = framework::pack<Cs...>;
208  using persistent_columns_t = framework::selected_pack<soa::is_persistent_column_t, Cs...>;
209  using external_index_columns_t = framework::selected_pack<soa::is_external_index_t, Cs...>;
210  using internal_index_columns_t = framework::selected_pack<soa::is_self_index_t, Cs...>;
211 
212  template <typename Key, typename... PCs>
213  static consteval std::array<bool, sizeof...(PCs)> getMap(framework::pack<PCs...>)
214  {
215  return std::array<bool, sizeof...(PCs)>{[]() {
216  if constexpr (requires { PCs::index_targets.size(); }) {
217  return Key::template isIndexTargetOf<PCs::index_targets.size(), PCs::index_targets>();
218  } else {
219  return false;
220  }
221  }()...};
222  }
223 
224  template <typename Key>
225  static consteval int getIndexPosToKey()
226  {
227  return getIndexPosToKey_impl<Key, framework::pack_size(persistent_columns_t{}), getMap<Key>(persistent_columns_t{})>();
228  }
229 
230  template <typename Key, size_t N, std::array<bool, N> map>
231  static consteval int getIndexPosToKey_impl()
232  {
233  constexpr const auto pos = std::find(map.begin(), map.end(), true);
234  if constexpr (pos != map.end()) {
235  return std::distance(map.begin(), pos);
236  } else {
237  return -1;
238  }
239  }
240 };
241 
242 template <typename D>
243 struct MetadataTrait {
244  using metadata = void;
245 };
246 
249 template <uint32_t H>
250 struct Hash {
251  static constexpr uint32_t hash = H;
252  static constexpr char const* const str{""};
253 };
254 
256 template <size_t N, std::array<soa::TableRef, N> ar, typename Key>
257 consteval auto filterForKey()
258 {
259  constexpr std::array<bool, N> test = []<size_t... Is>(std::index_sequence<Is...>) {
260  return std::array<bool, N>{(Key::template hasOriginal<ar[Is]>() || (o2::aod::MetadataTrait<o2::aod::Hash<ar[Is].desc_hash>>::metadata::template getIndexPosToKey<Key>() >= 0))...};
261  }(std::make_index_sequence<N>());
262  constexpr int correct = std::ranges::count(test.begin(), test.end(), true);
263  std::array<soa::TableRef, correct> out;
264  std::ranges::copy_if(ar.begin(), ar.end(), out.begin(), [&test](soa::TableRef const& r) { return test[std::distance(ar.begin(), std::find(ar.begin(), ar.end(), r))]; });
265  return out;
266 }
267 
269 #define O2HASH(_Str_) \
270  template <> \
271  struct Hash<_Str_ ""_h> { \
272  static constexpr uint32_t hash = _Str_ ""_h; \
273  static constexpr char const* const str{_Str_}; \
274  };
275 
277 #define O2ORIGIN(_Str_) \
278  template <> \
279  struct Hash<_Str_ ""_h> { \
280  static constexpr header::DataOrigin origin{_Str_}; \
281  static constexpr uint32_t hash = _Str_ ""_h; \
282  static constexpr char const* const str{_Str_}; \
283  };
284 
286 static inline constexpr uint32_t version(const char* const str)
287 {
288  if (str[0] == '\0') {
289  return 0;
290  }
291  size_t len = 0;
292  uint32_t res = 0;
293  while (str[len] != '/' && str[len] != '\0') {
294  ++len;
295  }
296  if (str[len - 1] == '\0') {
297  return -1;
298  }
299  for (auto i = len + 1; str[i] != '\0'; ++i) {
300  res = res * 10 + (int)(str[i] - '0');
301  }
302  return res;
303 }
304 
306 static inline constexpr std::string_view description_str(const char* const str)
307 {
308  size_t len = 0;
309  while (len < 15 && str[len] != '/') {
310  ++len;
311  }
312  return std::string_view{str, len};
313 }
314 
315 static inline constexpr header::DataDescription description(const char* const str)
316 {
317  size_t len = 0;
318  while (len < 15 && str[len] != '/') {
319  ++len;
320  }
321  char out[16];
322  for (auto i = 0; i < 16; ++i) {
323  out[i] = 0;
324  }
325  std::memcpy(out, str, len);
326  return {out};
327 }
328 
329 // Helpers to get strings from TableRef
330 template <soa::TableRef R>
331 consteval const char* label()
332 {
333  return o2::aod::Hash<R.label_hash>::str;
334 }
335 
336 template <soa::TableRef R>
337 consteval const char* origin_str()
338 {
339  return o2::aod::Hash<R.origin_hash>::str;
340 }
341 
342 template <soa::TableRef R>
343 consteval header::DataOrigin origin()
344 {
345  return o2::aod::Hash<R.origin_hash>::origin;
346 }
347 
348 template <soa::TableRef R>
349 consteval const char* signature()
350 {
351  return o2::aod::Hash<R.desc_hash>::str;
352 }
353 
355 template <typename T>
356 concept is_aod_hash = requires(T t) { t.hash; t.str; };
357 
358 template <typename T>
359 concept is_origin_hash = is_aod_hash<T> && requires(T t) { t.origin; };
360 
362 template <soa::TableRef R>
363 static constexpr auto sourceSpec()
364 {
365  return fmt::format("{}/{}/{}/{}", label<R>(), origin_str<R>(), description_str(signature<R>()), R.version);
366 }
367 } // namespace o2::aod
368 
369 namespace o2::soa
370 {
371 template <aod::is_aod_hash L, aod::is_aod_hash D, aod::is_origin_hash O, typename... Ts>
372 class Table;
373 
375 struct Binding {
376  void const* ptr = nullptr;
377  size_t hash = 0;
378  std::span<TableRef const> refs;
379 
380  template <typename T>
381  void bind(T const* table)
382  {
383  ptr = table;
384  hash = o2::framework::TypeIdHelpers::uniqueId<T>();
385  refs = std::span{T::originals};
386  }
387 
388  template <typename T>
389  T const* get() const
390  {
391  if (hash == o2::framework::TypeIdHelpers::uniqueId<T>()) {
392  return static_cast<T const*>(ptr);
393  }
394  return nullptr;
395  }
396 };
397 
398 template <typename... C>
399 auto createFieldsFromColumns(framework::pack<C...>)
400 {
401  return std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Field>>{C::asArrowField()...};
402 }
403 
404 using SelectionVector = std::vector<int64_t>;
405 
406 template <typename T>
407 concept has_parent_t = not_void<typename T::parent_t>;
408 
409 template <typename T>
410 concept is_metadata = framework::base_of_template<aod::TableMetadata, T>;
411 
412 template <typename T>
413 concept is_metadata_trait = framework::specialization_of_template<aod::MetadataTrait, T>;
414 
415 template <typename T>
416 concept has_metadata = is_metadata_trait<T> && not_void<typename T::metadata>;
417 
418 template <typename T>
419 concept has_extension = is_metadata<T> && not_void<typename T::extension_table_t>;
420 
421 template <typename T>
422 concept is_spawnable_column = std::same_as<typename T::spawnable_t, std::true_type>;
423 
424 template <typename B, typename E>
425 struct EquivalentIndex {
426  constexpr static bool value = false;
427 };
428 
429 template <aod::is_aod_hash A, aod::is_aod_hash B>
430 struct EquivalentIndexNG {
431  constexpr static bool value = false;
432 };
433 
434 template <typename B, typename E>
435 constexpr bool is_index_equivalent_v = EquivalentIndex<B, E>::value || EquivalentIndex<E, B>::value;
436 
437 template <aod::is_aod_hash A, aod::is_aod_hash B>
438 constexpr bool is_ng_index_equivalent_v = EquivalentIndexNG<A, B>::value || EquivalentIndexNG<B, A>::value;
439 
443 struct Chunked {
444  constexpr static bool chunked = true;
445 };
446 
449 struct Flat {
450  constexpr static bool chunked = false;
451 };
452 
454 template <typename T>
455 struct unwrap {
456  using type = T;
457 };
458 
459 template <typename T>
460 struct unwrap<std::vector<T>> {
461  using type = T;
462 };
463 
464 template <>
465 struct unwrap<bool> {
466  using type = char;
467 };
468 
469 template <typename T>
470 using unwrap_t = typename unwrap<T>::type;
471 
476 template <typename T, typename ChunkingPolicy = Chunked>
477 class ColumnIterator : ChunkingPolicy
478 {
479  static constexpr char SCALE_FACTOR = std::same_as<std::decay_t<T>, bool> ? 3 : 0;
480 
481  public:
486  ColumnIterator(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column)
487  : mColumn{column},
488  mCurrent{nullptr},
489  mCurrentPos{nullptr},
490  mLast{nullptr},
491  mFirstIndex{0},
492  mCurrentChunk{0},
493  mOffset{0}
494  {
495  auto array = getCurrentArray();
496  mCurrent = reinterpret_cast<unwrap_t<T> const*>(array->values()->data()) + (mOffset >> SCALE_FACTOR);
497  mLast = mCurrent + array->length();
498  }
499 
500  ColumnIterator() = default;
501  ColumnIterator(ColumnIterator<T, ChunkingPolicy> const&) = default;
502  ColumnIterator<T, ChunkingPolicy>& operator=(ColumnIterator<T, ChunkingPolicy> const&) = default;
503 
504  ColumnIterator(ColumnIterator<T, ChunkingPolicy>&&) = default;
505  ColumnIterator<T, ChunkingPolicy>& operator=(ColumnIterator<T, ChunkingPolicy>&&) = default;
506 
508  void nextChunk() const
509  {
510  auto previousArray = getCurrentArray();
511  mFirstIndex += previousArray->length();
512 
513  mCurrentChunk++;
514  auto array = getCurrentArray();
515  mCurrent = reinterpret_cast<unwrap_t<T> const*>(array->values()->data()) + (mOffset >> SCALE_FACTOR) - (mFirstIndex >> SCALE_FACTOR);
516  mLast = mCurrent + array->length() + (mFirstIndex >> SCALE_FACTOR);
517  }
518 
519  void prevChunk() const
520  {
521  auto previousArray = getCurrentArray();
522  mFirstIndex -= previousArray->length();
523 
524  mCurrentChunk--;
525  auto array = getCurrentArray();
526  mCurrent = reinterpret_cast<unwrap_t<T> const*>(array->values()->data()) + (mOffset >> SCALE_FACTOR) - (mFirstIndex >> SCALE_FACTOR);
527  mLast = mCurrent + array->length() + (mFirstIndex >> SCALE_FACTOR);
528  }
529 
530  void moveToChunk(int chunk)
531  {
532  if (mCurrentChunk < chunk) {
533  while (mCurrentChunk != chunk) {
534  nextChunk();
535  }
536  } else {
537  while (mCurrentChunk != chunk) {
538  prevChunk();
539  }
540  }
541  }
542 
544  void moveToEnd()
545  {
546  mCurrentChunk = mColumn->num_chunks() - 1;
547  auto array = getCurrentArray();
548  mFirstIndex = mColumn->length() - array->length();
549  mCurrent = reinterpret_cast<unwrap_t<T> const*>(array->values()->data()) + (mOffset >> SCALE_FACTOR) - (mFirstIndex >> SCALE_FACTOR);
550  mLast = mCurrent + array->length() + (mFirstIndex >> SCALE_FACTOR);
551  }
552 
553  decltype(auto) operator*() const
554  requires std::same_as<bool, std::decay_t<T>>
555  {
556  checkSkipChunk();
557  return (*(mCurrent - (mOffset >> SCALE_FACTOR) + ((*mCurrentPos + mOffset) >> SCALE_FACTOR)) & (1 << ((*mCurrentPos + mOffset) & 0x7))) != 0;
558  }
559 
560  decltype(auto) operator*() const
561  requires((!std::same_as<bool, std::decay_t<T>>) && std::same_as<arrow_array_for_t<T>, arrow::ListArray>)
562  {
563  checkSkipChunk();
564  auto list = std::static_pointer_cast<arrow::ListArray>(mColumn->chunk(mCurrentChunk));
565  auto offset = list->value_offset(*mCurrentPos - mFirstIndex);
566  auto length = list->value_length(*mCurrentPos - mFirstIndex);
567  return gsl::span{mCurrent + mFirstIndex + offset, mCurrent + mFirstIndex + (offset + length)};
568  }
569 
570  decltype(auto) operator*() const
571  requires((!std::same_as<bool, std::decay_t<T>>) && !std::same_as<arrow_array_for_t<T>, arrow::ListArray>)
572  {
573  checkSkipChunk();
574  return *(mCurrent + (*mCurrentPos >> SCALE_FACTOR));
575  }
576 
577  // Move to the chunk which containts element pos
578  ColumnIterator<T>& moveToPos()
579  {
580  checkSkipChunk();
581  return *this;
582  }
583 
584  mutable unwrap_t<T> const* mCurrent;
585  int64_t const* mCurrentPos;
586  mutable unwrap_t<T> const* mLast;
587  arrow::ChunkedArray const* mColumn;
588  mutable int mFirstIndex;
589  mutable int mCurrentChunk;
590  mutable int mOffset;
591 
592  private:
593  void checkSkipChunk() const
594  requires((ChunkingPolicy::chunked == true) && std::same_as<arrow_array_for_t<T>, arrow::ListArray>)
595  {
596  auto list = std::static_pointer_cast<arrow::ListArray>(mColumn->chunk(mCurrentChunk));
597  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(*mCurrentPos - mFirstIndex >= list->length())) {
598  nextChunk();
599  }
600  }
601 
602  void checkSkipChunk() const
603  requires((ChunkingPolicy::chunked == true) && !std::same_as<arrow_array_for_t<T>, arrow::ListArray>)
604  {
605  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(((mCurrent + (*mCurrentPos >> SCALE_FACTOR)) >= mLast))) {
606  nextChunk();
607  }
608  }
609 
610  void checkSkipChunk() const
611  requires(ChunkingPolicy::chunked == false)
612  {
613  }
615  auto getCurrentArray() const
616  requires(std::same_as<arrow_array_for_t<T>, arrow::FixedSizeListArray>)
617  {
618  std::shared_ptr<arrow::Array> chunkToUse = mColumn->chunk(mCurrentChunk);
619  mOffset = chunkToUse->offset();
620  chunkToUse = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<arrow::FixedSizeListArray>(chunkToUse)->values();
621  return std::static_pointer_cast<arrow_array_for_t<value_for_t<T>>>(chunkToUse);
622  }
623 
624  auto getCurrentArray() const
625  requires(std::same_as<arrow_array_for_t<T>, arrow::ListArray>)
626  {
627  std::shared_ptr<arrow::Array> chunkToUse = mColumn->chunk(mCurrentChunk);
628  mOffset = chunkToUse->offset();
629  chunkToUse = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<arrow::ListArray>(chunkToUse)->values();
630  mOffset = chunkToUse->offset();
631  return std::static_pointer_cast<arrow_array_for_t<value_for_t<T>>>(chunkToUse);
632  }
633 
634  auto getCurrentArray() const
635  requires(!std::same_as<arrow_array_for_t<T>, arrow::FixedSizeListArray> && !std::same_as<arrow_array_for_t<T>, arrow::ListArray>)
636  {
637  std::shared_ptr<arrow::Array> chunkToUse = mColumn->chunk(mCurrentChunk);
638  mOffset = chunkToUse->offset();
639  return std::static_pointer_cast<arrow_array_for_t<T>>(chunkToUse);
640  }
641 };
642 
643 template <typename T, typename INHERIT>
644 struct Column {
645  using inherited_t = INHERIT;
646  Column(ColumnIterator<T> const& it)
647  : mColumnIterator{it}
648  {
649  }
650 
651  Column() = default;
652  Column(Column const&) = default;
653  Column& operator=(Column const&) = default;
654 
655  Column(Column&&) = default;
656  Column& operator=(Column&&) = default;
657 
658  using type = T;
659  static constexpr const char* const& columnLabel() { return INHERIT::mLabel; }
660  ColumnIterator<T> const& getIterator() const
661  {
662  return mColumnIterator;
663  }
664 
665  static auto asArrowField()
666  {
667  return std::make_shared<arrow::Field>(inherited_t::mLabel, framework::expressions::concreteArrowType(framework::expressions::selectArrowType<type>()));
668  }
669 
672  ColumnIterator<T> mColumnIterator;
673 };
674 
677 template <typename F, typename INHERIT>
678 struct DynamicColumn {
679  using inherited_t = INHERIT;
680 
681  static constexpr const char* const& columnLabel() { return INHERIT::mLabel; }
682 };
683 
684 template <typename INHERIT>
685 struct IndexColumn {
686  using inherited_t = INHERIT;
687 
688  static constexpr const char* const& columnLabel() { return INHERIT::mLabel; }
689 };
690 
691 template <typename INHERIT>
692 struct MarkerColumn {
693  using inherited_t = INHERIT;
694 
695  static constexpr const char* const& columnLabel() { return INHERIT::mLabel; }
696 };
697 
698 template <size_t M = 0>
699 struct Marker : o2::soa::MarkerColumn<Marker<M>> {
700  using type = size_t;
701  using base = o2::soa::MarkerColumn<Marker<M>>;
702  constexpr inline static auto value = M;
703 
704  Marker() = default;
705  Marker(Marker const&) = default;
706  Marker(Marker&&) = default;
707 
708  Marker& operator=(Marker const&) = default;
709  Marker& operator=(Marker&&) = default;
710 
711  Marker(arrow::ChunkedArray const*) {}
712  constexpr inline auto mark()
713  {
714  return value;
715  }
716 
717  static constexpr const char* mLabel = "Marker";
718 };
719 
720 template <int64_t START = 0, int64_t END = -1>
721 struct Index : o2::soa::IndexColumn<Index<START, END>> {
722  using base = o2::soa::IndexColumn<Index<START, END>>;
723  constexpr inline static int64_t start = START;
724  constexpr inline static int64_t end = END;
725 
726  Index() = default;
727  Index(Index const&) = default;
728  Index(Index&&) = default;
729 
730  Index& operator=(Index const&) = default;
731  Index& operator=(Index&&) = default;
732 
733  Index(arrow::ChunkedArray const*)
734  {
735  }
736 
737  constexpr inline int64_t rangeStart()
738  {
739  return START;
740  }
741 
742  constexpr inline int64_t rangeEnd()
743  {
744  return END;
745  }
746 
747  [[nodiscard]] int64_t index() const
748  {
749  return index<0>();
750  }
751 
752  [[nodiscard]] int64_t filteredIndex() const
753  {
754  return index<1>();
755  }
756 
757  [[nodiscard]] int64_t globalIndex() const
758  {
759  return index<0>() + offsets<0>();
760  }
761 
762  template <int N = 0>
763  [[nodiscard]] int64_t index() const
764  {
765  return *std::get<N>(rowIndices);
766  }
767 
768  template <int N = 0>
769  [[nodiscard]] int64_t offsets() const
770  {
771  return *std::get<N>(rowOffsets);
772  }
773 
774  void setIndices(std::tuple<int64_t const*, int64_t const*> indices)
775  {
776  rowIndices = indices;
777  }
778 
779  void setOffsets(std::tuple<uint64_t const*> offsets)
780  {
781  rowOffsets = offsets;
782  }
783 
784  static constexpr const char* mLabel = "Index";
785  using type = int64_t;
786 
787  using bindings_t = typename o2::framework::pack<>;
788  std::tuple<> boundIterators;
789  std::tuple<int64_t const*, int64_t const*> rowIndices;
792  std::tuple<uint64_t const*> rowOffsets;
793 };
794 
795 template <typename D>
796 concept is_indexing_column = requires {
797  []<int64_t S, int64_t E>(o2::soa::Index<S, E>*) {}(std::declval<D*>());
798 };
799 
800 template <typename T>
801 concept is_dynamic_column = framework::base_of_template<soa::DynamicColumn, T>;
802 
803 template <typename T>
804 using is_dynamic_t = std::conditional_t<is_dynamic_column<T>, std::true_type, std::false_type>;
805 
806 template <typename T>
807 concept is_column = framework::base_of_template<soa::Column, T> || is_dynamic_column<T> || is_indexing_column<T> || framework::base_of_template<soa::MarkerColumn, T>;
808 
809 template <typename T>
810 using is_indexing_t = std::conditional_t<is_indexing_column<T>, std::true_type, std::false_type>;
811 
812 struct IndexPolicyBase {
814  int64_t mRowIndex = 0;
816  uint64_t mOffset = 0;
817 };
818 
819 struct RowViewSentinel {
820  int64_t const index;
821 };
822 
823 struct FilteredIndexPolicy : IndexPolicyBase {
824  // We use -1 in the IndexPolicyBase to indicate that the index is
825  // invalid. What will validate the index is the this->setCursor()
826  // which happens below which will properly setup the first index
827  // by remapping the filtered index 0 to whatever unfiltered index
828  // it belongs to.
829  FilteredIndexPolicy(gsl::span<int64_t const> selection, int64_t rows, uint64_t offset = 0)
830  : IndexPolicyBase{-1, offset},
831  mSelectedRows(selection),
832  mMaxSelection(selection.size()),
833  nRows{rows}
834  {
835  this->setCursor(0);
836  }
837 
838  void resetSelection(gsl::span<int64_t const> selection)
839  {
840  mSelectedRows = selection;
841  mMaxSelection = selection.size();
842  this->setCursor(0);
843  }
844 
845  FilteredIndexPolicy() = default;
846  FilteredIndexPolicy(FilteredIndexPolicy&&) = default;
847  FilteredIndexPolicy(FilteredIndexPolicy const&) = default;
848  FilteredIndexPolicy& operator=(FilteredIndexPolicy const&) = default;
849  FilteredIndexPolicy& operator=(FilteredIndexPolicy&&) = default;
850 
851  [[nodiscard]] std::tuple<int64_t const*, int64_t const*>
852  getIndices() const
853  {
854  return std::make_tuple(&mRowIndex, &mSelectionRow);
855  }
856 
857  [[nodiscard]] std::tuple<uint64_t const*>
858  getOffsets() const
859  {
860  return std::make_tuple(&mOffset);
861  }
862 
863  void limitRange(int64_t start, int64_t end)
864  {
865  this->setCursor(start);
866  if (end >= 0) {
867  mMaxSelection = std::min(end, mMaxSelection);
868  }
869  }
870 
871  void setCursor(int64_t i)
872  {
873  mSelectionRow = i;
874  updateRow();
875  }
876 
877  void moveByIndex(int64_t i)
878  {
879  mSelectionRow += i;
880  updateRow();
881  }
882 
883  friend bool operator==(FilteredIndexPolicy const& lh, FilteredIndexPolicy const& rh)
884  {
885  return lh.mSelectionRow == rh.mSelectionRow;
886  }
887 
888  bool operator==(RowViewSentinel const& sentinel) const
889  {
890  return O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(mSelectionRow == sentinel.index);
891  }
892 
896  void moveToEnd()
897  {
898  this->mSelectionRow = this->mMaxSelection;
899  this->mRowIndex = -1;
900  }
901 
902  [[nodiscard]] auto getSelectionRow() const
903  {
904  return mSelectionRow;
905  }
906 
907  [[nodiscard]] auto size() const
908  {
909  return mMaxSelection;
910  }
911 
912  [[nodiscard]] auto raw_size() const
913  {
914  return nRows;
915  }
916 
917  private:
918  inline void updateRow()
919  {
920  this->mRowIndex = O2_BUILTIN_LIKELY(mSelectionRow < mMaxSelection) ? mSelectedRows[mSelectionRow] : -1;
921  }
922  gsl::span<int64_t const> mSelectedRows;
923  int64_t mSelectionRow = 0;
924  int64_t mMaxSelection = 0;
925  int64_t nRows = 0;
926 };
927 
928 struct DefaultIndexPolicy : IndexPolicyBase {
930  DefaultIndexPolicy() = default;
931  DefaultIndexPolicy(DefaultIndexPolicy&&) = default;
932  DefaultIndexPolicy(DefaultIndexPolicy const&) = default;
933  DefaultIndexPolicy& operator=(DefaultIndexPolicy const&) = default;
934  DefaultIndexPolicy& operator=(DefaultIndexPolicy&&) = default;
935 
939  DefaultIndexPolicy(int64_t nRows, uint64_t offset)
940  : IndexPolicyBase{0, offset},
941  mMaxRow(nRows)
942  {
943  }
944 
945  DefaultIndexPolicy(FilteredIndexPolicy const& other)
946  : IndexPolicyBase{0, other.mOffset},
947  mMaxRow(other.raw_size())
948  {
949  }
950 
951  void limitRange(int64_t start, int64_t end)
952  {
953  this->setCursor(start);
954  if (end >= 0) {
955  mMaxRow = std::min(end, mMaxRow);
956  }
957  }
958 
959  [[nodiscard]] std::tuple<int64_t const*, int64_t const*>
960  getIndices() const
961  {
962  return std::make_tuple(&mRowIndex, &mRowIndex);
963  }
964 
965  [[nodiscard]] std::tuple<uint64_t const*>
966  getOffsets() const
967  {
968  return std::make_tuple(&mOffset);
969  }
970 
971  void setCursor(int64_t i)
972  {
973  this->mRowIndex = i;
974  }
975  void moveByIndex(int64_t i)
976  {
977  this->mRowIndex += i;
978  }
979 
980  void moveToEnd()
981  {
982  this->setCursor(mMaxRow);
983  }
984 
985  friend bool operator==(DefaultIndexPolicy const& lh, DefaultIndexPolicy const& rh)
986  {
987  return lh.mRowIndex == rh.mRowIndex;
988  }
989 
990  bool operator==(RowViewSentinel const& sentinel) const
991  {
992  return O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(this->mRowIndex == sentinel.index);
993  }
994 
995  [[nodiscard]] auto size() const
996  {
997  return mMaxRow;
998  }
999 
1000  int64_t mMaxRow = 0;
1001 };
1002 
1003 // template <OriginEnc ORIGIN, typename... C>
1004 // class Table;
1005 
1006 template <aod::is_aod_hash L, aod::is_aod_hash D, aod::is_origin_hash O, typename... T>
1007 class Table;
1008 
1009 template <typename T>
1010 concept is_table = framework::specialization_of_template<soa::Table, T> || framework::base_of_template<soa::Table, T>;
1011 
1014 template <typename C>
1015 struct ColumnDataHolder {
1016  C* first;
1017  arrow::ChunkedArray* second;
1018 };
1019 
1020 template <typename T, typename B>
1021 concept can_bind = requires(T&& t) {
1022  { t.B::mColumnIterator };
1023 };
1024 
1025 template <typename D, typename O, typename IP, typename... C>
1026 struct TableIterator : IP, C... {
1027  public:
1028  using self_t = TableIterator<D, O, IP, C...>;
1029  using policy_t = IP;
1030  using all_columns = framework::pack<C...>;
1031  using persistent_columns_t = framework::selected_pack<soa::is_persistent_column_t, C...>;
1032  using indexing_columns_t = framework::selected_pack<is_indexing_t, C...>;
1033  constexpr inline static bool has_index_v = framework::pack_size(indexing_columns_t{}) > 0;
1034  using external_index_columns_t = framework::selected_pack<soa::is_external_index_t, C...>;
1035  using internal_index_columns_t = framework::selected_pack<soa::is_self_index_t, C...>;
1036  using bindings_pack_t = decltype([]<typename... Cs>(framework::pack<Cs...>) -> framework::pack<typename Cs::binding_t...> {}(external_index_columns_t{})); // decltype(extractBindings(external_index_columns_t{}));
1037 
1038  TableIterator(arrow::ChunkedArray* columnData[sizeof...(C)], IP&& policy)
1039  : IP{policy},
1040  C(columnData[framework::has_type_at_v<C>(all_columns{})])...
1041  {
1042  bind();
1043  // In case we have an index column might need to constrain the actual
1044  // number of rows in the view to the range provided by the index.
1045  // FIXME: we should really understand what happens to an index when we
1046  // have a RowViewFiltered.
1047  if constexpr (has_index_v) {
1048  this->limitRange(this->rangeStart(), this->rangeEnd());
1049  }
1050  }
1051 
1052  TableIterator() = default;
1053  TableIterator(self_t const& other)
1054  : IP{static_cast<IP const&>(other)},
1055  C(static_cast<C const&>(other))...
1056  {
1057  bind();
1058  }
1059 
1060  TableIterator& operator=(TableIterator other)
1061  {
1062  IP::operator=(static_cast<IP const&>(other));
1063  (void(static_cast<C&>(*this) = static_cast<C>(other)), ...);
1064  bind();
1065  return *this;
1066  }
1067 
1068  TableIterator(TableIterator<D, O, FilteredIndexPolicy, C...> const& other)
1069  requires std::same_as<IP, DefaultIndexPolicy>
1070  : IP{static_cast<IP const&>(other)},
1071  C(static_cast<C const&>(other))...
1072  {
1073  bind();
1074  }
1075 
1076  TableIterator& operator++()
1077  {
1078  this->moveByIndex(1);
1079  return *this;
1080  }
1081 
1082  TableIterator operator++(int)
1083  {
1084  self_t copy = *this;
1085  this->operator++();
1086  return copy;
1087  }
1088 
1089  TableIterator& operator--()
1090  {
1091  this->moveByIndex(-1);
1092  return *this;
1093  }
1094 
1095  TableIterator operator--(int)
1096  {
1097  self_t copy = *this;
1098  this->operator--();
1099  return copy;
1100  }
1101 
1103  TableIterator operator+(int64_t inc) const
1104  {
1105  TableIterator copy = *this;
1106  copy.moveByIndex(inc);
1107  return copy;
1108  }
1109 
1110  TableIterator operator-(int64_t dec) const
1111  {
1112  return operator+(-dec);
1113  }
1114 
1115  TableIterator const& operator*() const
1116  {
1117  return *this;
1118  }
1119 
1120  template <typename... CL, typename TA>
1121  void doSetCurrentIndex(framework::pack<CL...>, TA* current)
1122  {
1123  (CL::setCurrent(current), ...);
1124  }
1125 
1126  template <typename CL>
1127  auto getCurrent() const
1128  {
1129  return CL::getCurrentRaw();
1130  }
1131 
1132  template <typename... Cs>
1133  auto getIndexBindingsImpl(framework::pack<Cs...>) const
1134  {
1135  return std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>{static_cast<Cs const&>(*this).getCurrentRaw()...};
1136  }
1137 
1138  auto getIndexBindings() const
1139  {
1140  return getIndexBindingsImpl(external_index_columns_t{});
1141  }
1142 
1143  template <typename... TA>
1144  void bindExternalIndices(TA*... current)
1145  {
1146  (doSetCurrentIndex(external_index_columns_t{}, current), ...);
1147  }
1148 
1149  template <typename... Cs>
1150  void doSetCurrentIndexRaw(framework::pack<Cs...> p, std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>&& ptrs)
1151  {
1152  (Cs::setCurrentRaw(ptrs[framework::has_type_at_v<Cs>(p)]), ...);
1153  }
1154 
1155  template <typename... Cs, typename I>
1156  void doSetCurrentInternal(framework::pack<Cs...>, I const* ptr)
1157  {
1158  o2::soa::Binding b;
1159  b.bind(ptr);
1160  (Cs::setCurrentRaw(b), ...);
1161  }
1162 
1163  void bindExternalIndicesRaw(std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>&& ptrs)
1164  {
1165  doSetCurrentIndexRaw(external_index_columns_t{}, std::forward<std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>>(ptrs));
1166  }
1167 
1168  template <typename I>
1169  void bindInternalIndices(I const* table)
1170  {
1171  doSetCurrentInternal(internal_index_columns_t{}, table);
1172  }
1173 
1174  private:
1176  template <typename... PC>
1177  void doMoveToEnd(framework::pack<PC...>)
1178  {
1179  (PC::mColumnIterator.moveToEnd(), ...);
1180  }
1181 
1184  void bind()
1185  {
1186  using namespace o2::soa;
1187  auto f = framework::overloaded{
1188  [this]<soa::is_persistent_column T>(T*) -> void { T::mColumnIterator.mCurrentPos = &this->mRowIndex; },
1189  [this]<soa::is_dynamic_column T>(T*) -> void { bindDynamicColumn<T>(typename T::bindings_t{}); },
1190  [this]<typename T>(T*) -> void {},
1191  };
1192  (f(static_cast<C*>(nullptr)), ...);
1193  if constexpr (has_index_v) {
1194  this->setIndices(this->getIndices());
1195  this->setOffsets(this->getOffsets());
1196  }
1197  }
1198 
1199  template <typename DC, typename... B>
1200  auto bindDynamicColumn(framework::pack<B...>)
1201  {
1202  DC::boundIterators = std::make_tuple(getDynamicBinding<B>()...);
1203  }
1204 
1205  // Sometimes dynamic columns are defined for tables in
1206  // the hope that it will be joined / extended with another one which provides
1207  // the full set of bindings. This is to avoid a compilation
1208  // error if constructor for the table or any other thing involving a missing
1209  // binding is preinstanciated.
1210  template <typename B>
1211  requires(can_bind<self_t, B>)
1212  decltype(auto) getDynamicBinding()
1213  {
1214  static_assert(std::same_as<decltype(&(static_cast<B*>(this)->mColumnIterator)), std::decay_t<decltype(B::mColumnIterator)>*>, "foo");
1215  return &(static_cast<B*>(this)->mColumnIterator);
1216  // return static_cast<std::decay_t<decltype(B::mColumnIterator)>*>(nullptr);
1217  }
1218 
1219  template <typename B>
1220  decltype(auto) getDynamicBinding()
1221  {
1222  return static_cast<std::decay_t<decltype(B::mColumnIterator)>*>(nullptr);
1223  }
1224 };
1225 
1226 struct ArrowHelpers {
1227  static std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> joinTables(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables);
1228  static std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> concatTables(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables);
1229 };
1230 
1232 template <typename T>
1233 concept is_iterator = framework::base_of_template<TableIterator, T> || framework::specialization_of_template<TableIterator, T>;
1234 
1235 template <typename T>
1236 concept with_originals = requires {
1237  T::originals.size();
1238 };
1239 
1240 template <typename T>
1241 concept with_sources = requires {
1242  T::sources.size();
1243 };
1244 
1245 template <typename T>
1246 concept with_base_table = not_void<typename aod::MetadataTrait<o2::aod::Hash<T::ref.desc_hash>>::metadata::base_table_t>;
1247 
1248 template <size_t N1, std::array<TableRef, N1> os1, size_t N2, std::array<TableRef, N2> os2>
1249 consteval bool is_compatible()
1250 {
1251  return []<size_t... Is>(std::index_sequence<Is...>) {
1252  return ([]<size_t... Ks>(std::index_sequence<Ks...>) {
1253  constexpr auto h = os1[Is].desc_hash;
1254  using H = o2::aod::Hash<h>;
1255  return (((h == os2[Ks].desc_hash) || is_ng_index_equivalent_v<H, o2::aod::Hash<os2[Ks].desc_hash>>) || ...);
1256  }(std::make_index_sequence<N2>()) ||
1257  ...);
1258  }(std::make_index_sequence<N1>());
1259 }
1260 
1261 template <with_originals T, with_originals B>
1262 consteval bool is_binding_compatible_v()
1263 {
1264  return is_compatible<T::originals.size(), T::originals, B::originals.size(), B::originals>();
1265 }
1266 
1267 template <typename T, typename B>
1268 using is_binding_compatible = std::conditional_t<is_binding_compatible_v<T, typename B::binding_t>(), std::true_type, std::false_type>;
1269 
1270 template <typename L, typename D, typename O, typename Key, typename H, typename... Ts>
1271 struct IndexTable;
1272 
1273 template <typename T>
1274 concept is_index_table = framework::specialization_of_template<o2::soa::IndexTable, T>;
1275 
1276 template <soa::is_table T>
1277 static constexpr std::string getLabelForTable()
1278 {
1279  return std::string{aod::label<std::decay_t<T>::originals[0]>()};
1280 }
1281 
1282 template <soa::is_table T>
1283  requires(!(soa::is_index_table<T> || soa::with_base_table<T>))
1284 static constexpr std::string getLabelFromType()
1285 {
1286  return getLabelForTable<T>();
1287 }
1288 
1289 template <soa::is_iterator T>
1290 static constexpr std::string getLabelFromType()
1291 {
1292  return getLabelForTable<typename std::decay_t<T>::parent_t>();
1293 }
1294 
1295 template <soa::is_index_table T>
1296 static constexpr std::string getLabelFromType()
1297 {
1298  return getLabelForTable<typename std::decay_t<T>::first_t>();
1299 }
1300 template <soa::with_base_table T>
1301 static constexpr std::string getLabelFromType()
1302 {
1303  return getLabelForTable<typename aod::MetadataTrait<o2::aod::Hash<T::ref.desc_hash>>::metadata::base_table_t>();
1304 }
1305 
1306 template <typename... C>
1307 static constexpr auto hasColumnForKey(framework::pack<C...>, std::string const& key)
1308 {
1309  return ((C::inherited_t::mLabel == key) || ...);
1310 }
1311 
1312 template <TableRef ref>
1313 static constexpr std::pair<bool, std::string> hasKey(std::string const& key)
1314 {
1315  return {hasColumnForKey(typename aod::MetadataTrait<o2::aod::Hash<ref.desc_hash>>::metadata::columns{}, key), aod::label<ref>()};
1316 }
1317 
1318 template <typename... C>
1319 static constexpr auto haveKey(framework::pack<C...>, std::string const& key)
1320 {
1321  return std::vector{hasKey<C>(key)...};
1322 }
1323 
1324 void notFoundColumn(const char* label, const char* key);
1325 void missingOptionalPreslice(const char* label, const char* key);
1326 
1327 template <with_originals T, bool OPT = false>
1328 static constexpr std::string getLabelFromTypeForKey(std::string const& key)
1329 {
1330  if constexpr (T::originals.size() == 1) {
1331  auto locate = hasKey<T::originals[0]>(key);
1332  if (locate.first) {
1333  return locate.second;
1334  }
1335  } else {
1336  auto locate = [&]<size_t... Is>(std::index_sequence<Is...>) {
1337  return std::vector{hasKey<T::originals[Is]>(key)...};
1338  }(std::make_index_sequence<T::originals.size()>{});
1339  auto it = std::find_if(locate.begin(), locate.end(), [](auto const& x) { return x.first; });
1340  if (it != locate.end()) {
1341  return it->second;
1342  }
1343  }
1344  if constexpr (!OPT) {
1345  notFoundColumn(getLabelFromType<std::decay_t<T>>().data(), key.data());
1346  } else {
1347  return "[MISSING]";
1348  }
1349  O2_BUILTIN_UNREACHABLE();
1350 }
1351 
1352 template <typename B, typename... C>
1353 consteval static bool hasIndexTo(framework::pack<C...>&&)
1354 {
1355  return (o2::soa::is_binding_compatible_v<B, typename C::binding_t>() || ...);
1356 }
1357 
1358 template <typename B, typename... C>
1359 consteval static bool hasSortedIndexTo(framework::pack<C...>&&)
1360 {
1361  return ((C::sorted && o2::soa::is_binding_compatible_v<B, typename C::binding_t>()) || ...);
1362 }
1363 
1364 template <typename B, typename Z>
1365 consteval static bool relatedByIndex()
1366 {
1367  return hasIndexTo<B>(typename Z::table_t::external_index_columns_t{});
1368 }
1369 
1370 template <typename B, typename Z>
1371 consteval static bool relatedBySortedIndex()
1372 {
1373  return hasSortedIndexTo<B>(typename Z::table_t::external_index_columns_t{});
1374 }
1375 } // namespace o2::soa
1376 
1377 namespace o2::framework
1378 {
1379 template <typename T, bool OPT = false, bool SORTED = true>
1380 struct PresliceBase {
1381  constexpr static bool sorted = SORTED;
1382  constexpr static bool optional = OPT;
1383  using target_t = T;
1384  const std::string binding;
1385 
1386  PresliceBase(expressions::BindingNode index_)
1387  : binding{o2::soa::getLabelFromTypeForKey<T, OPT>(index_.name)},
1388  bindingKey{binding, index_.name} {}
1389 
1390  void updateSliceInfo(std::conditional_t<SORTED, SliceInfoPtr, SliceInfoUnsortedPtr>&& si)
1391  {
1392  sliceInfo = si;
1393  }
1394 
1395  std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> getSliceFor(int value, std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> const& input, uint64_t& offset) const
1396  {
1397  if constexpr (OPT) {
1398  if (isMissing()) {
1399  return nullptr;
1400  }
1401  }
1402  if constexpr (SORTED) {
1403  auto [offset_, count] = sliceInfo.getSliceFor(value);
1404  auto output = input->Slice(offset_, count);
1405  offset = static_cast<int64_t>(offset_);
1406  return output;
1407  } else {
1408  static_assert(SORTED, "Wrong method called for unsorted cache");
1409  }
1410  }
1411 
1412  gsl::span<const int64_t> getSliceFor(int value) const
1413  {
1414  if constexpr (OPT) {
1415  if (isMissing()) {
1416  return {};
1417  }
1418  }
1419  if constexpr (!SORTED) {
1420  return sliceInfo.getSliceFor(value);
1421  } else {
1422  static_assert(!SORTED, "Wrong method called for sorted cache");
1423  }
1424  }
1425 
1426  bool isMissing() const
1427  {
1428  return binding == "[MISSING]";
1429  }
1430 
1431  StringPair const& getBindingKey() const
1432  {
1433  return bindingKey;
1434  }
1435 
1436  std::conditional_t<SORTED, SliceInfoPtr, SliceInfoUnsortedPtr> sliceInfo;
1437 
1438  StringPair bindingKey;
1439 };
1440 
1441 template <typename T>
1442 using PresliceUnsorted = PresliceBase<T, false, false>;
1443 template <typename T>
1444 using PresliceUnsortedOptional = PresliceBase<T, true, false>;
1445 template <typename T>
1446 using Preslice = PresliceBase<T, false, true>;
1447 template <typename T>
1448 using PresliceOptional = PresliceBase<T, true, true>;
1449 
1450 } // namespace o2::framework
1451 
1452 namespace o2::soa
1453 {
1454 template <soa::is_table T>
1455 class FilteredBase;
1456 template <typename T>
1457 class Filtered;
1458 
1459 template <typename T>
1460 concept has_filtered_policy = not_void<typename T::policy_t> && std::same_as<typename T::policy_t, soa::FilteredIndexPolicy>;
1461 
1462 template <typename T>
1463 concept is_filtered_iterator = is_iterator<T> && has_filtered_policy<T>;
1464 
1465 template <typename T>
1466 concept is_filtered_table = framework::base_of_template<soa::FilteredBase, T>;
1467 
1468 // FIXME: compatbility declaration to be removed
1469 template <typename T>
1470 constexpr bool is_soa_filtered_v = is_filtered_table<T>;
1471 
1472 template <typename T>
1473 concept is_filtered = is_filtered_table<T> || is_filtered_iterator<T>;
1474 
1475 template <typename T>
1476 concept is_not_filtered_table = is_table<T> && !is_filtered_table<T>;
1477 
1479 template <typename... Is>
1480 static consteval auto extractBindings(framework::pack<Is...>)
1481 {
1482  return framework::pack<typename Is::binding_t...>{};
1483 }
1484 
1485 SelectionVector selectionToVector(gandiva::Selection const& sel);
1486 
1487 template <typename T, typename C, bool OPT, bool SORTED>
1488 auto doSliceBy(T const* table, o2::framework::PresliceBase<C, OPT, SORTED> const& container, int value)
1489 {
1490  if constexpr (o2::soa::is_binding_compatible_v<C, T>()) {
1491  if constexpr (OPT) {
1492  if (container.isMissing()) {
1493  missingOptionalPreslice(getLabelFromType<std::decay_t<T>>().data(), container.bindingKey.second.c_str());
1494  }
1495  }
1496  if constexpr (SORTED) {
1497  uint64_t offset = 0;
1498  auto out = container.getSliceFor(value, table->asArrowTable(), offset);
1499  auto t = typename T::self_t({out}, offset);
1500  table->copyIndexBindings(t);
1501  t.bindInternalIndicesTo(table);
1502  return t;
1503  } else {
1504  auto selection = container.getSliceFor(value);
1505  if constexpr (soa::is_filtered_table<T>) {
1506  auto t = soa::Filtered<typename T::base_t>({table->asArrowTable()}, selection);
1507  table->copyIndexBindings(t);
1508  t.bindInternalIndicesTo(table);
1509  t.intersectWithSelection(table->getSelectedRows()); // intersect filters
1510  return t;
1511  } else {
1512  auto t = soa::Filtered<T>({table->asArrowTable()}, selection);
1513  table->copyIndexBindings(t);
1514  t.bindInternalIndicesTo(table);
1515  return t;
1516  }
1517  }
1518  } else {
1519  if constexpr (SORTED) {
1520  static_assert(o2::framework::always_static_assert_v<C>, "Wrong Preslice<> entry used: incompatible type");
1521  } else {
1522  static_assert(o2::framework::always_static_assert_v<C>, "Wrong PresliceUnsorted<> entry used: incompatible type");
1523  }
1524  }
1525 }
1526 
1527 template <typename T>
1528 auto prepareFilteredSlice(T const* table, std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> slice, uint64_t offset)
1529 {
1530  if (offset >= static_cast<uint64_t>(table->tableSize())) {
1531  if constexpr (soa::is_filtered_table<T>) {
1532  Filtered<typename T::base_t> fresult{{{slice}}, SelectionVector{}, 0};
1533  table->copyIndexBindings(fresult);
1534  return fresult;
1535  } else {
1536  typename T::self_t fresult{{{slice}}, SelectionVector{}, 0};
1537  table->copyIndexBindings(fresult);
1538  return fresult;
1539  }
1540  }
1541  auto start = offset;
1542  auto end = start + slice->num_rows();
1543  auto mSelectedRows = table->getSelectedRows();
1544  auto start_iterator = std::lower_bound(mSelectedRows.begin(), mSelectedRows.end(), start);
1545  auto stop_iterator = std::lower_bound(start_iterator, mSelectedRows.end(), end);
1546  SelectionVector slicedSelection{start_iterator, stop_iterator};
1547  std::transform(slicedSelection.begin(), slicedSelection.end(), slicedSelection.begin(),
1548  [&start](int64_t idx) {
1549  return idx - static_cast<int64_t>(start);
1550  });
1551  if constexpr (soa::is_filtered_table<T>) {
1552  Filtered<typename T::base_t> fresult{{{slice}}, std::move(slicedSelection), start};
1553  table->copyIndexBindings(fresult);
1554  return fresult;
1555  } else {
1556  typename T::self_t fresult{{{slice}}, std::move(slicedSelection), start};
1557  table->copyIndexBindings(fresult);
1558  return fresult;
1559  }
1560 }
1561 
1562 template <typename T, typename C, bool OPT>
1563 auto doFilteredSliceBy(T const* table, o2::framework::PresliceBase<C, OPT> const& container, int value)
1564 {
1565  if constexpr (o2::soa::is_binding_compatible_v<C, T>()) {
1566  if constexpr (OPT) {
1567  if (container.isMissing()) {
1568  missingOptionalPreslice(getLabelFromType<T>().data(), container.bindingKey.second.c_str());
1569  }
1570  }
1571  uint64_t offset = 0;
1572  auto slice = container.getSliceFor(value, table->asArrowTable(), offset);
1573  return prepareFilteredSlice(table, slice, offset);
1574  } else {
1575  static_assert(o2::framework::always_static_assert_v<C>, "Wrong Preslice<> entry used: incompatible type");
1576  }
1577 }
1578 
1579 template <typename T>
1580 auto doSliceByCached(T const* table, framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache)
1581 {
1582  auto localCache = cache.ptr->getCacheFor({o2::soa::getLabelFromTypeForKey<T>(node.name), node.name});
1583  auto [offset, count] = localCache.getSliceFor(value);
1584  auto t = typename T::self_t({table->asArrowTable()->Slice(static_cast<uint64_t>(offset), count)}, static_cast<uint64_t>(offset));
1585  table->copyIndexBindings(t);
1586  return t;
1587 }
1588 
1589 template <typename T>
1590 auto doFilteredSliceByCached(T const* table, framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache)
1591 {
1592  auto localCache = cache.ptr->getCacheFor({o2::soa::getLabelFromTypeForKey<T>(node.name), node.name});
1593  auto [offset, count] = localCache.getSliceFor(value);
1594  auto slice = table->asArrowTable()->Slice(static_cast<uint64_t>(offset), count);
1595  return prepareFilteredSlice(table, slice, offset);
1596 }
1597 
1598 template <typename T>
1599 auto doSliceByCachedUnsorted(T const* table, framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache)
1600 {
1601  auto localCache = cache.ptr->getCacheUnsortedFor({o2::soa::getLabelFromTypeForKey<T>(node.name), node.name});
1602  if constexpr (soa::is_filtered_table<T>) {
1603  auto t = typename T::self_t({table->asArrowTable()}, localCache.getSliceFor(value));
1604  t.intersectWithSelection(table->getSelectedRows());
1605  table->copyIndexBindings(t);
1606  return t;
1607  } else {
1608  auto t = Filtered<T>({table->asArrowTable()}, localCache.getSliceFor(value));
1609  table->copyIndexBindings(t);
1610  return t;
1611  }
1612 }
1613 
1614 template <with_originals T>
1615 auto select(T const& t, framework::expressions::Filter const& f)
1616 {
1617  return Filtered<T>({t.asArrowTable()}, selectionToVector(framework::expressions::createSelection(t.asArrowTable(), f)));
1618 }
1619 
1620 arrow::ChunkedArray* getIndexFromLabel(arrow::Table* table, const char* label);
1621 
1622 template <typename D, typename O, typename IP, typename... C>
1623 consteval auto base_iter(framework::pack<C...>&&) -> TableIterator<D, O, IP, C...>
1624 {
1625 }
1626 
1627 template <TableRef ref, typename... Ts>
1628  requires((sizeof...(Ts) > 0) && (soa::is_column<Ts> && ...))
1629 consteval auto getColumns()
1630 {
1631  return framework::pack<Ts...>{};
1632 }
1633 
1634 template <TableRef ref, typename... Ts>
1635  requires((sizeof...(Ts) > 0) && !(soa::is_column<Ts> || ...) && (ref.origin_hash == "CONC"_h))
1636 consteval auto getColumns()
1637 {
1638  return framework::full_intersected_pack_t<typename Ts::columns_t...>{};
1639 }
1640 
1641 template <TableRef ref, typename... Ts>
1642  requires((sizeof...(Ts) > 0) && !(soa::is_column<Ts> || ...) && (ref.origin_hash != "CONC"_h))
1643 consteval auto getColumns()
1644 {
1645  return framework::concatenated_pack_unique_t<typename Ts::columns_t...>{};
1646 }
1647 
1648 template <TableRef ref, typename... Ts>
1649  requires(sizeof...(Ts) == 0 && soa::has_metadata<aod::MetadataTrait<o2::aod::Hash<ref.desc_hash>>>)
1650 consteval auto getColumns()
1651 {
1652  return typename aod::MetadataTrait<o2::aod::Hash<ref.desc_hash>>::metadata::columns{};
1653 }
1654 
1655 template <TableRef ref, typename... Ts>
1656  requires((sizeof...(Ts) == 0) || (o2::soa::is_column<Ts> && ...))
1657 consteval auto computeOriginals()
1658 {
1659  return std::array<TableRef, 1>{ref};
1660 }
1661 
1662 template <TableRef ref, typename... Ts>
1663  requires((sizeof...(Ts) > 0) && (!o2::soa::is_column<Ts> || ...))
1664 consteval auto computeOriginals()
1665 {
1666  return o2::soa::mergeOriginals<Ts...>();
1667 }
1668 
1671 template <aod::is_aod_hash L, aod::is_aod_hash D, aod::is_origin_hash O, typename... Ts>
1672 class Table
1673 {
1674  public:
1675  static constexpr const auto ref = TableRef{L::hash, D::hash, O::hash, o2::aod::version(D::str)};
1676  using self_t = Table<L, D, O, Ts...>;
1677  using table_t = self_t;
1678 
1679  static constexpr const auto originals = computeOriginals<ref, Ts...>();
1680 
1681  template <size_t N, std::array<TableRef, N> bindings>
1682  requires(ref.origin_hash == "CONC"_h)
1683  static consteval auto isIndexTargetOf()
1684  {
1685  return false;
1686  }
1687 
1688  template <size_t N, std::array<TableRef, N> bindings>
1689  requires(ref.origin_hash == "JOIN"_h)
1690  static consteval auto isIndexTargetOf()
1691  {
1692  return std::find_if(self_t::originals.begin(), self_t::originals.end(),
1693  [](TableRef const& r) {
1694  return std::find(bindings.begin(), bindings.end(), r) != bindings.end();
1695  }) != self_t::originals.end();
1696  }
1697 
1698  template <size_t N, std::array<TableRef, N> bindings>
1699  requires(!(ref.origin_hash == "CONC"_h || ref.origin_hash == "JOIN"_h))
1700  static consteval auto isIndexTargetOf()
1701  {
1702  return std::find(bindings.begin(), bindings.end(), self_t::ref) != bindings.end();
1703  }
1704 
1705  template <TableRef r>
1706  static consteval bool hasOriginal()
1707  {
1708  return std::find_if(originals.begin(), originals.end(), [](TableRef const& o) { return o.desc_hash == r.desc_hash; }) != originals.end();
1709  }
1710 
1711  using columns_t = decltype(getColumns<ref, Ts...>());
1712 
1713  using persistent_columns_t = decltype([]<typename... C>(framework::pack<C...>&&) -> framework::selected_pack<soa::is_persistent_column_t, C...> {}(columns_t{}));
1714  using column_types = decltype([]<typename... C>(framework::pack<C...>) -> framework::pack<typename C::type...> {}(persistent_columns_t{}));
1715 
1716  using external_index_columns_t = decltype([]<typename... C>(framework::pack<C...>&&) -> framework::selected_pack<soa::is_external_index_t, C...> {}(columns_t{}));
1717  using internal_index_columns_t = decltype([]<typename... C>(framework::pack<C...>&&) -> framework::selected_pack<soa::is_self_index_t, C...> {}(columns_t{}));
1718  template <typename IP>
1719  using base_iterator = decltype(base_iter<D, O, IP>(columns_t{}));
1720 
1721  template <typename IP, typename Parent, typename... T>
1722  struct TableIteratorBase : base_iterator<IP> {
1723  using columns_t = typename Parent::columns_t;
1724  using external_index_columns_t = typename Parent::external_index_columns_t;
1725  using bindings_pack_t = decltype([]<typename... C>(framework::pack<C...>) -> framework::pack<typename C::binding_t...> {}(external_index_columns_t{}));
1726  // static constexpr const std::array<TableRef, sizeof...(T)> originals{T::ref...};
1727  static constexpr auto originals = Parent::originals;
1728  using policy_t = IP;
1729  using parent_t = Parent;
1730 
1731  TableIteratorBase() = default;
1732 
1733  TableIteratorBase(arrow::ChunkedArray* columnData[framework::pack_size(columns_t{})], IP&& policy)
1734  : base_iterator<IP>(columnData, std::forward<decltype(policy)>(policy))
1735  {
1736  }
1737 
1738  template <typename P, typename... Os>
1739  TableIteratorBase& operator=(TableIteratorBase<IP, P, Os...> other)
1740  requires(P::ref.desc_hash == Parent::ref.desc_hash)
1741  {
1742  static_cast<base_iterator<IP>&>(*this) = static_cast<base_iterator<IP>>(other);
1743  return *this;
1744  }
1745 
1746  template <typename P>
1747  TableIteratorBase& operator=(TableIteratorBase<IP, P, T...> other)
1748  {
1749  static_cast<base_iterator<IP>&>(*this) = static_cast<base_iterator<IP>>(other);
1750  return *this;
1751  }
1752 
1753  template <typename P>
1754  TableIteratorBase& operator=(TableIteratorBase<FilteredIndexPolicy, P, T...> other)
1755  requires std::same_as<IP, DefaultIndexPolicy>
1756  {
1757  static_cast<base_iterator<IP>&>(*this) = static_cast<base_iterator<FilteredIndexPolicy>>(other);
1758  return *this;
1759  }
1760 
1761  template <typename P, typename O1, typename... Os>
1762  TableIteratorBase(TableIteratorBase<IP, P, O1, Os...> const& other)
1763  requires(P::ref.desc_hash == Parent::ref.desc_hash)
1764  {
1765  *this = other;
1766  }
1767 
1768  template <typename P, typename O1, typename... Os>
1769  TableIteratorBase(TableIteratorBase<IP, P, O1, Os...>&& other) noexcept
1770  requires(P::ref.desc_hash == Parent::ref.desc_hash)
1771  {
1772  *this = other;
1773  }
1774 
1775  template <typename P>
1776  TableIteratorBase(TableIteratorBase<IP, P, T...> const& other)
1777  {
1778  *this = other;
1779  }
1780 
1781  template <typename P>
1782  TableIteratorBase(TableIteratorBase<IP, P, T...>&& other) noexcept
1783  {
1784  *this = other;
1785  }
1786 
1787  template <typename P>
1788  TableIteratorBase(TableIteratorBase<FilteredIndexPolicy, P, T...> other)
1789  requires std::same_as<IP, DefaultIndexPolicy>
1790  {
1791  *this = other;
1792  }
1793 
1794  TableIteratorBase& operator=(RowViewSentinel const& other)
1795  {
1796  this->mRowIndex = other.index;
1797  return *this;
1798  }
1799  template <typename P>
1800  void matchTo(TableIteratorBase<IP, P, T...> const& other)
1801  {
1802  this->mRowIndex = other.mRowIndex;
1803  }
1804 
1805  template <typename P, typename... Os>
1806  void matchTo(TableIteratorBase<IP, P, Os...> const& other)
1807  requires std::same_as<typename P::table_t, typename Parent::table_t>
1808  {
1809  this->mRowIndex = other.mRowIndex;
1810  }
1811 
1812  template <typename TI>
1813  auto getId() const
1814  {
1815  using decayed = std::decay_t<TI>;
1816  if constexpr (framework::has_type<decayed>(bindings_pack_t{})) { // index to another table
1817  constexpr auto idx = framework::has_type_at_v<decayed>(bindings_pack_t{});
1818  return framework::pack_element_t<idx, external_index_columns_t>::getId();
1819  } else if constexpr (std::same_as<decayed, Parent>) { // self index
1820  return this->globalIndex();
1821  } else if constexpr (is_indexing_column<decayed>) { // soa::Index<>
1822  return this->globalIndex();
1823  } else {
1824  return static_cast<int32_t>(-1);
1825  }
1826  }
1827 
1828  template <typename CD, typename... CDArgs>
1829  auto getDynamicColumn() const
1830  {
1831  using decayed = std::decay_t<CD>;
1832  static_assert(is_dynamic_t<decayed>(), "Requested column is not a dynamic column");
1833  return static_cast<decayed>(*this).template getDynamicValue<CDArgs...>();
1834  }
1835 
1836  template <typename B, typename CC>
1837  auto getValue() const
1838  {
1839  using COL = std::decay_t<CC>;
1840  static_assert(is_dynamic_t<COL>() || soa::is_persistent_column<COL>, "Should be persistent or dynamic column with no argument that has a return type convertable to float");
1841  return static_cast<B>(static_cast<COL>(*this).get());
1842  }
1843 
1844  template <typename B, typename... CCs>
1845  std::array<B, sizeof...(CCs)> getValues() const
1846  {
1847  static_assert(std::same_as<B, float> || std::same_as<B, double>, "The common return type should be float or double");
1848  return {getValue<B, CCs>()...};
1849  }
1850 
1851  using IP::size;
1852 
1853  using base_iterator<IP>::operator++;
1854 
1856  TableIteratorBase operator+(int64_t inc) const
1857  {
1858  TableIteratorBase copy = *this;
1859  copy.moveByIndex(inc);
1860  return copy;
1861  }
1862 
1863  TableIteratorBase operator-(int64_t dec) const
1864  {
1865  return operator+(-dec);
1866  }
1867 
1868  TableIteratorBase const& operator*() const
1869  {
1870  return *this;
1871  }
1872  };
1873 
1874  template <typename IP, typename Parent, typename... T>
1875  using iterator_template = TableIteratorBase<IP, Parent, T...>;
1876 
1877  template <typename IP, typename Parent>
1878  static consteval auto full_iter()
1879  {
1880  if constexpr (sizeof...(Ts) == 0) {
1881  return iterator_template<IP, Parent>{};
1882  } else {
1883  if constexpr ((o2::soa::is_column<Ts> && ...)) {
1884  return iterator_template<IP, Parent>{};
1885  } else {
1886  return iterator_template<IP, Parent, Ts...>{};
1887  }
1888  }
1889  }
1890 
1891  template <typename IP, typename Parent>
1892  using iterator_template_o = decltype(full_iter<IP, Parent>());
1893 
1894  using iterator = iterator_template_o<DefaultIndexPolicy, table_t>;
1895  using filtered_iterator = iterator_template_o<FilteredIndexPolicy, table_t>;
1896 
1897  using unfiltered_iterator = iterator;
1898  using const_iterator = iterator;
1899  using unfiltered_const_iterator = unfiltered_iterator;
1900 
1901  static constexpr auto hashes()
1902  {
1903  return []<typename... C>(framework::pack<C...>) { return std::set{{o2::framework::TypeIdHelpers::uniqueId<C>()...}}; }(columns_t{});
1904  }
1905 
1906  Table(std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> table, uint64_t offset = 0)
1907  : mTable(table),
1908  mEnd{table->num_rows()},
1909  mOffset(offset)
1910  {
1911  if (mTable->num_rows() == 0) {
1912  for (size_t ci = 0; ci < framework::pack_size(columns_t{}); ++ci) {
1913  mColumnChunks[ci] = nullptr;
1914  }
1915  mBegin = mEnd;
1916  } else {
1917  auto lookups = [this]<typename... C>(framework::pack<C...>) -> std::array<arrow::ChunkedArray*, framework::pack_size(columns_t{})> { return {lookupColumn<C>()...}; }(columns_t{});
1918  for (size_t ci = 0; ci < framework::pack_size(columns_t{}); ++ci) {
1919  mColumnChunks[ci] = lookups[ci];
1920  }
1921  mBegin = unfiltered_iterator{mColumnChunks, {table->num_rows(), offset}};
1922  mBegin.bindInternalIndices(this);
1923  }
1924  }
1925 
1926  Table(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, uint64_t offset = 0)
1927  requires(ref.origin_hash != "CONC"_h)
1928  : Table(ArrowHelpers::joinTables(std::move(tables)), offset)
1929  {
1930  }
1931 
1932  Table(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, uint64_t offset = 0)
1933  requires(ref.origin_hash == "CONC"_h)
1934  : Table(ArrowHelpers::concatTables(std::move(tables)), offset)
1935  {
1936  }
1937 
1938  template <typename Key>
1939  inline arrow::ChunkedArray* getIndexToKey()
1940  {
1941  constexpr auto map = []<typename... Cs>(framework::pack<Cs...>) {
1942  return std::array<bool, sizeof...(Cs)>{[]() {
1943  if constexpr (requires { Cs::index_targets.size(); }) {
1944  return Key::template isIndexTargetOf<Cs::index_targets.size(), Cs::index_targets>();
1945  } else {
1946  return false;
1947  }
1948  }()...};
1949  }(persistent_columns_t{});
1950  constexpr auto pos = std::find(map.begin(), map.end(), true);
1951  if constexpr (pos != map.end()) {
1952  return mColumnChunks[std::distance(map.begin(), pos)];
1953  } else {
1954  static_assert(framework::always_static_assert_v<Key>, "This table does not have an index to given Key");
1955  }
1956  }
1957 
1958  auto& cached_begin()
1959  {
1960  return mBegin;
1961  }
1962 
1963  auto const& cached_begin() const
1964  {
1965  return mBegin;
1966  }
1967 
1968  unfiltered_iterator begin()
1969  {
1970  return unfiltered_iterator(mBegin);
1971  }
1972 
1973  RowViewSentinel end()
1974  {
1975  return RowViewSentinel{mEnd};
1976  }
1977 
1978  filtered_iterator filtered_begin(gsl::span<int64_t const> selection)
1979  {
1980  // Note that the FilteredIndexPolicy will never outlive the selection which
1981  // is held by the table, so we are safe passing the bare pointer. If it does it
1982  // means that the iterator on a table is outliving the table itself, which is
1983  // a bad idea.
1984  return filtered_iterator(mColumnChunks, {selection, mTable->num_rows(), mOffset});
1985  }
1986 
1987  iterator iteratorAt(uint64_t i) const
1988  {
1989  return rawIteratorAt(i);
1990  }
1991 
1992  unfiltered_iterator rawIteratorAt(uint64_t i) const
1993  {
1994  auto it = mBegin;
1995  it.setCursor(i);
1996  return it;
1997  }
1998 
1999  unfiltered_const_iterator begin() const
2000  {
2001  return unfiltered_const_iterator(mBegin);
2002  }
2003 
2004  [[nodiscard]] RowViewSentinel end() const
2005  {
2006  return RowViewSentinel{mEnd};
2007  }
2008 
2010  [[nodiscard]] std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> asArrowTable() const
2011  {
2012  return mTable;
2013  }
2015  auto offset() const
2016  {
2017  return mOffset;
2018  }
2020  [[nodiscard]] int64_t size() const
2021  {
2022  return mTable->num_rows();
2023  }
2024 
2025  [[nodiscard]] int64_t tableSize() const
2026  {
2027  return size();
2028  }
2029 
2032  template <typename... TA>
2033  void bindExternalIndices(TA*... current)
2034  {
2035  mBegin.bindExternalIndices(current...);
2036  }
2037 
2038  template <typename I>
2039  void bindInternalIndicesTo(I const* ptr)
2040  {
2041  mBegin.bindInternalIndices(ptr);
2042  }
2043 
2044  void bindInternalIndicesExplicit(o2::soa::Binding binding)
2045  {
2046  doBindInternalIndicesExplicit(internal_index_columns_t{}, binding);
2047  }
2048 
2049  template <typename... Cs>
2050  void doBindInternalIndicesExplicit(framework::pack<Cs...>, o2::soa::Binding binding)
2051  {
2052  (static_cast<Cs>(mBegin).setCurrentRaw(binding), ...);
2053  }
2054 
2055  void bindExternalIndicesRaw(std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>&& ptrs)
2056  {
2057  mBegin.bindExternalIndicesRaw(std::forward<std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>>(ptrs));
2058  }
2059 
2060  template <typename T, typename... Cs>
2061  void doCopyIndexBindings(framework::pack<Cs...>, T& dest) const
2062  {
2063  dest.bindExternalIndicesRaw(mBegin.getIndexBindings());
2064  }
2065 
2066  template <typename T>
2067  void copyIndexBindings(T& dest) const
2068  {
2069  doCopyIndexBindings(external_index_columns_t{}, dest);
2070  }
2071 
2072  auto select(framework::expressions::Filter const& f) const
2073  {
2074  auto t = o2::soa::select(*this, f);
2075  copyIndexBindings(t);
2076  return t;
2077  }
2078 
2079  auto sliceByCached(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
2080  {
2081  return doSliceByCached(this, node, value, cache);
2082  }
2083 
2084  auto sliceByCachedUnsorted(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
2085  {
2086  return doSliceByCachedUnsorted(this, node, value, cache);
2087  }
2088 
2089  template <typename T1, bool OPT, bool SORTED>
2090  auto sliceBy(o2::framework::PresliceBase<T1, OPT, SORTED> const& container, int value) const
2091  {
2092  return doSliceBy(this, container, value);
2093  }
2094 
2095  auto rawSlice(uint64_t start, uint64_t end) const
2096  {
2097  return self_t{mTable->Slice(start, end - start + 1), start};
2098  }
2099 
2100  auto emptySlice() const
2101  {
2102  return self_t{mTable->Slice(0, 0), 0};
2103  }
2104 
2105  private:
2106  template <typename T>
2107  arrow::ChunkedArray* lookupColumn()
2108  {
2109  if constexpr (soa::is_persistent_column<T>) {
2110  auto label = T::columnLabel();
2111  return getIndexFromLabel(mTable.get(), label);
2112  } else {
2113  return nullptr;
2114  }
2115  }
2116  std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> mTable = nullptr;
2117  uint64_t mOffset = 0;
2118  // Cached pointers to the ChunkedArray associated to a column
2119  arrow::ChunkedArray* mColumnChunks[framework::pack_size(columns_t{})];
2120  RowViewSentinel mEnd;
2121  iterator mBegin;
2122 };
2123 
2124 template <uint32_t D, soa::is_column... C>
2125 using InPlaceTable = Table<o2::aod::Hash<"TEST"_h>, o2::aod::Hash<D>, o2::aod::Hash<"TEST"_h>, C...>;
2126 
2127 namespace row_helpers
2128 {
2129 template <soa::is_persistent_column... Cs>
2130 std::array<arrow::ChunkedArray*, sizeof...(Cs)> getArrowColumns(arrow::Table* table, framework::pack<Cs...>)
2131 {
2132  return std::array<arrow::ChunkedArray*, sizeof...(Cs)>{o2::soa::getIndexFromLabel(table, Cs::columnLabel())...};
2133 }
2134 
2135 template <soa::is_persistent_column... Cs>
2136 std::array<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Array>, sizeof...(Cs)> getChunks(arrow::Table* table, framework::pack<Cs...>, uint64_t ci)
2137 {
2138  return std::array<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Array>, sizeof...(Cs)>{o2::soa::getIndexFromLabel(table, Cs::columnLabel())->chunk(ci)...};
2139 }
2140 
2141 template <typename T, soa::is_persistent_column C>
2142 typename C::type getSingleRowData(arrow::Table* table, T& rowIterator, uint64_t ci = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max(), uint64_t ai = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max(), uint64_t globalIndex = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max())
2143 {
2144  if (ci == std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max() || ai == std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max()) {
2145  auto colIterator = static_cast<C>(rowIterator).getIterator();
2146  ci = colIterator.mCurrentChunk;
2147  ai = *(colIterator.mCurrentPos) - colIterator.mFirstIndex;
2148  }
2149  return std::static_pointer_cast<o2::soa::arrow_array_for_t<typename C::type>>(o2::soa::getIndexFromLabel(table, C::columnLabel())->chunk(ci))->raw_values()[ai];
2150 }
2151 
2152 template <typename T, soa::is_dynamic_column C>
2153 typename C::type getSingleRowData(arrow::Table*, T& rowIterator, uint64_t ci = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max(), uint64_t ai = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max(), uint64_t globalIndex = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max())
2154 {
2155  if (globalIndex != std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max() && globalIndex != *std::get<0>(rowIterator.getIndices())) {
2156  rowIterator.setCursor(globalIndex);
2157  }
2158  return rowIterator.template getDynamicColumn<C>();
2159 }
2160 
2161 template <typename T, soa::is_index_column C>
2162 typename C::type getSingleRowData(arrow::Table*, T& rowIterator, uint64_t ci = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max(), uint64_t ai = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max(), uint64_t globalIndex = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max())
2163 {
2164  if (globalIndex != std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max() && globalIndex != *std::get<0>(rowIterator.getIndices())) {
2165  rowIterator.setCursor(globalIndex);
2166  }
2167  return rowIterator.template getId<C>();
2168 }
2169 
2170 template <typename T, typename... Cs>
2171 std::tuple<typename Cs::type...> getRowData(arrow::Table* table, T rowIterator, uint64_t ci = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max(), uint64_t ai = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max(), uint64_t globalIndex = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max())
2172 {
2173  return std::make_tuple(getSingleRowData<T, Cs>(table, rowIterator, ci, ai, globalIndex)...);
2174 }
2175 } // namespace row_helpers
2176 } // namespace o2::soa
2177 
2178 namespace o2::aod
2179 {
2180 O2ORIGIN("AOD");
2181 O2ORIGIN("AOD1");
2182 O2ORIGIN("AOD2");
2183 O2ORIGIN("DYN");
2184 O2ORIGIN("IDX");
2185 O2ORIGIN("JOIN");
2186 O2HASH("JOIN/0");
2187 O2ORIGIN("CONC");
2188 O2HASH("CONC/0");
2189 O2ORIGIN("TEST");
2190 O2HASH("TEST/0");
2191 } // namespace o2::aod
2192 
2193 #define DECLARE_EQUIVALENT_FOR_INDEX(_Base_, _Equiv_) \
2194  template <> \
2195  struct EquivalentIndexNG<o2::aod::Hash<_Base_::ref.desc_hash>, o2::aod::Hash<_Equiv_::ref.desc_hash>> { \
2196  constexpr static bool value = true; \
2197  }
2198 
2199 #define DECLARE_EQUIVALENT_FOR_INDEX_NG(_Base_, _Equiv_) \
2200  template <> \
2201  struct EquivalentIndexNG<o2::aod::Hash<_Base_ ""_h>, o2::aod::Hash<_Equiv_ ""_h>> { \
2202  constexpr static bool value = true; \
2203  }
2204 
2205 #define DECLARE_SOA_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Label_) \
2206  struct _Name_ : o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_> { \
2207  static constexpr const char* mLabel = _Label_; \
2208  static_assert(!((*(mLabel + 1) == 'I' && *(mLabel + 2) == 'n' && *(mLabel + 3) == 'd' && *(mLabel + 4) == 'e' && *(mLabel + 5) == 'x')), "Index is not a valid column name"); \
2209  using base = o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_>; \
2210  using type = _Type_; \
2211  using column_t = _Name_; \
2212  _Name_(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column) \
2213  : o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_>(o2::soa::ColumnIterator<type>(column)) \
2214  { \
2215  } \
2216  \
2217  _Name_() = default; \
2218  _Name_(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
2219  _Name_& operator=(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
2220  \
2221  decltype(auto) _Getter_() const \
2222  { \
2223  return *mColumnIterator; \
2224  } \
2225  \
2226  decltype(auto) get() const \
2227  { \
2228  return _Getter_(); \
2229  } \
2230  }; \
2231  [[maybe_unused]] static constexpr o2::framework::expressions::BindingNode _Getter_ { _Label_, o2::framework::TypeIdHelpers::uniqueId<_Name_>(), \
2232  o2::framework::expressions::selectArrowType<_Type_>() }
2233 
2234 #define DECLARE_SOA_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_) \
2235  DECLARE_SOA_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, "f" #_Name_)
2236 
2239 #define MAKEINT(_Size_) uint##_Size_##_t
2240 
2241 #define DECLARE_SOA_BITMAP_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Size_, _Label_) \
2242  struct _Name_ : o2::soa::Column<MAKEINT(_Size_), _Name_> { \
2243  static constexpr const char* mLabel = _Label_; \
2244  static_assert(!((*(mLabel + 1) == 'I' && *(mLabel + 2) == 'n' && *(mLabel + 3) == 'd' && *(mLabel + 4) == 'e' && *(mLabel + 5) == 'x')), "Index is not a valid column name"); \
2245  using base = o2::soa::Column<MAKEINT(_Size_), _Name_>; \
2246  using type = MAKEINT(_Size_); \
2247  _Name_(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column) \
2248  : o2::soa::Column<type, _Name_>(o2::soa::ColumnIterator<type>(column)) \
2249  { \
2250  } \
2251  \
2252  _Name_() = default; \
2253  _Name_(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
2254  _Name_& operator=(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
2255  \
2256  decltype(auto) _Getter_##_raw() const \
2257  { \
2258  return *mColumnIterator; \
2259  } \
2260  \
2261  bool _Getter_##_bit(int bit) const \
2262  { \
2263  return (*mColumnIterator & (static_cast<type>(1) << bit)) >> bit; \
2264  } \
2265  }; \
2266  [[maybe_unused]] static constexpr o2::framework::expressions::BindingNode _Getter_ { _Label_, o2::framework::TypeIdHelpers::uniqueId<_Name_>(), \
2267  o2::framework::expressions::selectArrowType<MAKEINT(_Size_)>() }
2268 
2269 #define DECLARE_SOA_BITMAP_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_, _Size_) \
2270  DECLARE_SOA_BITMAP_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Size_, "f" #_Name_)
2271 
2274 #define DECLARE_SOA_EXPRESSION_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Label_, _Expression_) \
2275  struct _Name_ : o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_> { \
2276  static constexpr const char* mLabel = _Label_; \
2277  using base = o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_>; \
2278  using type = _Type_; \
2279  using column_t = _Name_; \
2280  using spawnable_t = std::true_type; \
2281  _Name_(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column) \
2282  : o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_>(o2::soa::ColumnIterator<type>(column)) \
2283  { \
2284  } \
2285  \
2286  _Name_() = default; \
2287  _Name_(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
2288  _Name_& operator=(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
2289  \
2290  decltype(auto) _Getter_() const \
2291  { \
2292  return *mColumnIterator; \
2293  } \
2294  \
2295  decltype(auto) get() const \
2296  { \
2297  return _Getter_(); \
2298  } \
2299  \
2300  static o2::framework::expressions::Projector Projector() \
2301  { \
2302  return _Expression_; \
2303  } \
2304  }; \
2305  [[maybe_unused]] static constexpr o2::framework::expressions::BindingNode _Getter_ { _Label_, o2::framework::TypeIdHelpers::uniqueId<_Name_>(), \
2306  o2::framework::expressions::selectArrowType<_Type_>() }
2307 
2308 #define DECLARE_SOA_EXPRESSION_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Expression_) \
2309  DECLARE_SOA_EXPRESSION_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, "f" #_Name_, _Expression_);
2310 
2329 
2331 
2332 template <o2::soa::is_table T>
2333 consteval auto getIndexTargets()
2334 {
2335  return T::originals;
2336 }
2337 
2338 #define DECLARE_SOA_SLICE_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Table_, _Label_, _Suffix_) \
2339  struct _Name_##IdSlice : o2::soa::Column<_Type_[2], _Name_##IdSlice> { \
2340  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<_Type_>, "Index type must be integral"); \
2341  static_assert((*_Suffix_ == '\0') || (*_Suffix_ == '_'), "Suffix has to begin with _"); \
2342  static constexpr const char* mLabel = "fIndexSlice" _Label_ _Suffix_; \
2343  using base = o2::soa::Column<_Type_[2], _Name_##IdSlice>; \
2344  using type = _Type_[2]; \
2345  using column_t = _Name_##IdSlice; \
2346  using binding_t = _Table_; \
2347  static constexpr auto index_targets = getIndexTargets<_Table_>(); \
2348  _Name_##IdSlice(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column) \
2349  : o2::soa::Column<_Type_[2], _Name_##IdSlice>(o2::soa::ColumnIterator<type>(column)) \
2350  { \
2351  } \
2352  \
2353  _Name_##IdSlice() = default; \
2354  _Name_##IdSlice(_Name_##IdSlice const& other) = default; \
2355  _Name_##IdSlice& operator=(_Name_##IdSlice const& other) = default; \
2356  std::array<_Type_, 2> inline getIds() const \
2357  { \
2358  return _Getter_##Ids(); \
2359  } \
2360  \
2361  bool has_##_Getter_() const \
2362  { \
2363  auto a = *mColumnIterator; \
2364  return a[0] >= 0 && a[1] >= 0; \
2365  } \
2366  \
2367  std::array<_Type_, 2> _Getter_##Ids() const \
2368  { \
2369  auto a = *mColumnIterator; \
2370  return std::array{a[0], a[1]}; \
2371  } \
2372  \
2373  template <typename T> \
2374  auto _Getter_##_as() const \
2375  { \
2376  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(mBinding.ptr == nullptr)) { \
2377  o2::soa::notBoundTable(#_Table_); \
2378  } \
2379  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2380  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2381  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2382  } \
2383  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(!has_##_Getter_())) { \
2384  return t->emptySlice(); \
2385  } \
2386  auto a = *mColumnIterator; \
2387  auto r = t->rawSlice(a[0], a[1]); \
2388  t->copyIndexBindings(r); \
2389  r.bindInternalIndicesTo(t); \
2390  return r; \
2391  } \
2392  \
2393  auto _Getter_() const \
2394  { \
2395  return _Getter_##_as<binding_t>(); \
2396  } \
2397  \
2398  template <typename T> \
2399  bool setCurrent(T const* current) \
2400  { \
2401  if constexpr (o2::soa::is_binding_compatible_v<T, binding_t>()) { \
2402  assert(current != nullptr); \
2403  this->mBinding.bind(current); \
2404  return true; \
2405  } \
2406  return false; \
2407  } \
2408  \
2409  bool setCurrentRaw(o2::soa::Binding current) \
2410  { \
2411  this->mBinding = current; \
2412  return true; \
2413  } \
2414  binding_t const* getCurrent() const { return mBinding.get<binding_t>(); } \
2415  o2::soa::Binding getCurrentRaw() const { return mBinding; } \
2416  o2::soa::Binding mBinding; \
2417  };
2418 
2419 #define DECLARE_SOA_SLICE_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Table_, _Suffix_) DECLARE_SOA_SLICE_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Table_, #_Table_, _Suffix_)
2420 #define DECLARE_SOA_SLICE_INDEX_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_) DECLARE_SOA_SLICE_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, int32_t, _Name_##s, "")
2421 #define DECLARE_SOA_SLICE_INDEX_COLUMN_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, _Label_) DECLARE_SOA_SLICE_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, int32_t, _Name_##s, _Label_, "")
2422 
2424 #define DECLARE_SOA_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Table_, _Label_, _Suffix_) \
2425  struct _Name_##Ids : o2::soa::Column<std::vector<_Type_>, _Name_##Ids> { \
2426  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<_Type_>, "Index type must be integral"); \
2427  static_assert((*_Suffix_ == '\0') || (*_Suffix_ == '_'), "Suffix has to begin with _"); \
2428  static constexpr const char* mLabel = "fIndexArray" _Label_ _Suffix_; \
2429  using base = o2::soa::Column<std::vector<_Type_>, _Name_##Ids>; \
2430  using type = std::vector<_Type_>; \
2431  using column_t = _Name_##Ids; \
2432  using binding_t = _Table_; \
2433  static constexpr auto index_targets = getIndexTargets<_Table_>(); \
2434  _Name_##Ids(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column) \
2435  : o2::soa::Column<std::vector<_Type_>, _Name_##Ids>(o2::soa::ColumnIterator<type>(column)) \
2436  { \
2437  } \
2438  \
2439  _Name_##Ids() = default; \
2440  _Name_##Ids(_Name_##Ids const& other) = default; \
2441  _Name_##Ids& operator=(_Name_##Ids const& other) = default; \
2442  \
2443  gsl::span<const _Type_> inline getIds() const \
2444  { \
2445  return _Getter_##Ids(); \
2446  } \
2447  \
2448  gsl::span<const _Type_> _Getter_##Ids() const \
2449  { \
2450  return *mColumnIterator; \
2451  } \
2452  \
2453  bool has_##_Getter_() const \
2454  { \
2455  return !(*mColumnIterator).empty(); \
2456  } \
2457  \
2458  template <typename T> \
