2459  auto _Getter_##_as() const \
2460  { \
2461  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(mBinding.ptr == nullptr)) { \
2462  o2::soa::notBoundTable(#_Table_); \
2463  } \
2464  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2465  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2466  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2467  } \
2468  return getIterators<T>(); \
2469  } \
2470  \
2471  template <typename T> \
2472  auto filtered_##_Getter_##_as() const \
2473  { \
2474  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(mBinding.ptr == nullptr)) { \
2475  o2::soa::notBoundTable(#_Table_); \
2476  } \
2477  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2478  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2479  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2480  } \
2481  return getFilteredIterators<T>(); \
2482  } \
2483  \
2484  template <typename T> \
2485  auto getIterators() const \
2486  { \
2487  auto result = std::vector<typename T::unfiltered_iterator>(); \
2488  for (auto& i : *mColumnIterator) { \
2489  result.push_back(mBinding.get<T>()->rawIteratorAt(i)); \
2490  } \
2491  return result; \
2492  } \
2493  \
2494  template <typename T> \
2495  std::vector<typename T::iterator> getFilteredIterators() const \
2496  { \
2497  if constexpr (o2::soa::is_filtered_table<T>) { \
2498  auto result = std::vector<typename T::iterator>(); \
2499  for (auto const& i : *mColumnIterator) { \
2500  auto pos = mBinding.get<T>()->isInSelectedRows(i); \
2501  if (pos > 0) { \
2502  result.emplace_back(mBinding.get<T>()->iteratorAt(pos)); \
2503  } \
2504  } \
2505  return result; \
2506  } else { \
2507  static_assert(o2::framework::always_static_assert_v<T>, "T is not a Filtered type"); \
2508  } \
2509  return {}; \
2510  } \
2511  \
2512  auto _Getter_() const \
2513  { \
2514  return _Getter_##_as<binding_t>(); \
2515  } \
2516  \
2517  template <typename T> \
2518  auto _Getter_##_first_as() const \
2519  { \
2520  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(mBinding.ptr == nullptr)) { \
2521  o2::soa::notBoundTable(#_Table_); \
2522  } \
2523  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2524  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2525  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2526  } \
2527  return t->rawIteratorAt((*mColumnIterator)[0]); \
2528  } \
2529  \
2530  template <typename T> \
2531  auto _Getter_##_last_as() const \
2532  { \
2533  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(mBinding.ptr == nullptr)) { \
2534  o2::soa::notBoundTable(#_Table_); \
2535  } \
2536  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2537  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2538  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2539  } \
2540  return t->rawIteratorAt((*mColumnIterator).back()); \
2541  } \
2542  \
2543  auto _Getter_first() const \
2544  { \
2545  return _Getter_##_first_as<binding_t>(); \
2546  } \
2547  \
2548  auto _Getter_last() const \
2549  { \
2550  return _Getter_##_last_as<binding_t>(); \
2551  } \
2552  \
2553  template <typename T> \
2554  bool setCurrent(T const* current) \
2555  { \
2556  if constexpr (o2::soa::is_binding_compatible_v<T, binding_t>()) { \
2557  assert(current != nullptr); \
2558  this->mBinding.bind(current); \
2559  return true; \
2560  } \
2561  return false; \
2562  } \
2563  \
2564  bool setCurrentRaw(o2::soa::Binding current) \
2565  { \
2566  this->mBinding = current; \
2567  return true; \
2568  } \
2569  binding_t const* getCurrent() const { return mBinding.get<binding_t>(); } \
2570  o2::soa::Binding getCurrentRaw() const { return mBinding; } \
2571  o2::soa::Binding mBinding; \
2572  };
2573 
2574 #define DECLARE_SOA_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Table_, _Suffix_) DECLARE_SOA_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Table_, #_Table_, _Suffix_)
2575 #define DECLARE_SOA_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_) DECLARE_SOA_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, int32_t, _Name_##s, "")
2576 #define DECLARE_SOA_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, _Label_) DECLARE_SOA_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, int32_t, _Name_##s, _Label_, "")
2577 
2579 #define DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Table_, _Label_, _Suffix_) \
2580  struct _Name_##Id : o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_##Id> { \
2581  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<_Type_>, "Index type must be integral"); \
2582  static_assert((*_Suffix_ == '\0') || (*_Suffix_ == '_'), "Suffix has to begin with _"); \
2583  static constexpr const char* mLabel = "fIndex" _Label_ _Suffix_; \
2584  using base = o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_##Id>; \
2585  using type = _Type_; \
2586  using column_t = _Name_##Id; \
2587  using binding_t = _Table_; \
2588  static constexpr auto index_targets = getIndexTargets<_Table_>(); \
2589  _Name_##Id(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column) \
2590  : o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_##Id>(o2::soa::ColumnIterator<type>(column)) \
2591  { \
2592  } \
2593  \
2594  _Name_##Id() = default; \
2595  _Name_##Id(_Name_##Id const& other) = default; \
2596  _Name_##Id& operator=(_Name_##Id const& other) = default; \
2597  type inline getId() const \
2598  { \
2599  return _Getter_##Id(); \
2600  } \
2601  \
2602  type _Getter_##Id() const \
2603  { \
2604  return *mColumnIterator; \
2605  } \
2606  \
2607  bool has_##_Getter_() const \
2608  { \
2609  return *mColumnIterator >= 0; \
2610  } \
2611  \
2612  template <typename T> \
2613  auto _Getter_##_as() const \
2614  { \
2615  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(mBinding.ptr == nullptr)) { \
2616  o2::soa::notBoundTable(#_Table_); \
2617  } \
2618  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(!has_##_Getter_())) { \
2619  o2::soa::accessingInvalidIndexFor(#_Getter_); \
2620  } \
2621  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2622  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2623  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2624  } \
2625  return t->rawIteratorAt(*mColumnIterator); \
2626  } \
2627  \
2628  auto _Getter_() const \
2629  { \
2630  return _Getter_##_as<binding_t>(); \
2631  } \
2632  \
2633  template <typename T> \
2634  bool setCurrent(T* current) \
2635  { \
2636  if constexpr (o2::soa::is_binding_compatible_v<T, binding_t>()) { \
2637  assert(current != nullptr); \
2638  this->mBinding.bind(current); \
2639  return true; \
2640  } \
2641  return false; \
2642  } \
2643  \
2644  bool setCurrentRaw(o2::soa::Binding current) \
2645  { \
2646  this->mBinding = current; \
2647  return true; \
2648  } \
2649  binding_t const* getCurrent() const { return mBinding.get<binding_t>(); } \
2650  o2::soa::Binding getCurrentRaw() const { return mBinding; } \
2651  o2::soa::Binding mBinding; \
2652  }; \
2653  [[maybe_unused]] static constexpr o2::framework::expressions::BindingNode _Getter_##Id { "fIndex" #_Table_ _Suffix_, o2::framework::TypeIdHelpers::uniqueId<_Name_##Id>(), \
2654  o2::framework::expressions::selectArrowType<_Type_>() }
2655 
2656 #define DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Table_, _Suffix_) DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Table_, #_Table_, _Suffix_)
2657 #define DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_) DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, int32_t, _Name_##s, "")
2658 #define DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_COLUMN_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, _Label_) DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL_CUSTOM(_Name_, _Getter_, int32_t, _Name_##s, _Label_, "")
2659 
2661 #define DECLARE_SOA_SELF_INDEX_COLUMN_COMPLETE(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Label_, _IndexTarget_) \
2662  struct _Name_##Id : o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_##Id> { \
2663  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<_Type_>, "Index type must be integral"); \
2664  static constexpr const char* mLabel = "fIndex" _Label_; \
2665  using base = o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_##Id>; \
2666  using type = _Type_; \
2667  using column_t = _Name_##Id; \
2668  using self_index_t = std::true_type; \
2669  using compatible_signature = std::conditional<aod::is_aod_hash<_IndexTarget_>, _IndexTarget_, void>; \
2670  _Name_##Id(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column) \
2671  : o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_##Id>(o2::soa::ColumnIterator<type>(column)) \
2672  { \
2673  } \
2674  \
2675  _Name_##Id() = default; \
2676  _Name_##Id(_Name_##Id const& other) = default; \
2677  _Name_##Id& operator=(_Name_##Id const& other) = default; \
2678  type inline getId() const \
2679  { \
2680  return _Getter_##Id(); \
2681  } \
2682  \
2683  type _Getter_##Id() const \
2684  { \
2685  return *mColumnIterator; \
2686  } \
2687  \
2688  bool has_##_Getter_() const \
2689  { \
2690  return *mColumnIterator >= 0; \
2691  } \
2692  \
2693  template <typename T> \
2694  auto _Getter_##_as() const \
2695  { \
2696  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(!has_##_Getter_())) { \
2697  o2::soa::accessingInvalidIndexFor(#_Getter_); \
2698  } \
2699  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2700  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2701  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2702  } \
2703  return t->rawIteratorAt(*mColumnIterator); \
2704  } \
2705  \
2706  bool setCurrentRaw(o2::soa::Binding current) \
2707  { \
2708  this->mBinding = current; \
2709  return true; \
2710  } \
2711  o2::soa::Binding getCurrentRaw() const { return mBinding; } \
2712  o2::soa::Binding mBinding; \
2713  }; \
2714  [[maybe_unused]] static constexpr o2::framework::expressions::BindingNode _Getter_##Id { "fIndex" _Label_, o2::framework::TypeIdHelpers::uniqueId<_Name_##Id>(), \
2715  o2::framework::expressions::selectArrowType<_Type_>() }
2716 
2717 #define DECLARE_SOA_SELF_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Label_) DECLARE_SOA_SELF_INDEX_COLUMN_COMPLETE(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Label_, void)
2718 #define DECLARE_SOA_SELF_INDEX_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_) DECLARE_SOA_SELF_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, int32_t, #_Name_)
2720 #define DECLARE_SOA_SELF_SLICE_INDEX_COLUMN_COMPLETE(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Label_, _IndexTarget_) \
2721  struct _Name_##IdSlice : o2::soa::Column<_Type_[2], _Name_##IdSlice> { \
2722  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<_Type_>, "Index type must be integral"); \
2723  static constexpr const char* mLabel = "fIndexSlice" _Label_; \
2724  using base = o2::soa::Column<_Type_[2], _Name_##IdSlice>; \
2725  using type = _Type_[2]; \
2726  using column_t = _Name_##IdSlice; \
2727  using self_index_t = std::true_type; \
2728  using compatible_signature = std::conditional<aod::is_aod_hash<_IndexTarget_>, _IndexTarget_, void>; \
2729  _Name_##IdSlice(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column) \
2730  : o2::soa::Column<_Type_[2], _Name_##IdSlice>(o2::soa::ColumnIterator<type>(column)) \
2731  { \
2732  } \
2733  \
2734  _Name_##IdSlice() = default; \
2735  _Name_##IdSlice(_Name_##IdSlice const& other) = default; \
2736  _Name_##IdSlice& operator=(_Name_##IdSlice const& other) = default; \
2737  std::array<_Type_, 2> inline getIds() const \
2738  { \
2739  return _Getter_##Ids(); \
2740  } \
2741  \
2742  bool has_##_Getter_() const \
2743  { \
2744  auto a = *mColumnIterator; \
2745  return a[0] >= 0 && a[1] >= 0; \
2746  } \
2747  \
2748  std::array<_Type_, 2> _Getter_##Ids() const \
2749  { \
2750  auto a = *mColumnIterator; \
2751  return std::array{a[0], a[1]}; \
2752  } \
2753  \
2754  template <typename T> \
2755  auto _Getter_##_as() const \
2756  { \
2757  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2758  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2759  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2760  } \
2761  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(!has_##_Getter_())) { \
2762  return t->emptySlice(); \
2763  } \
2764  auto a = *mColumnIterator; \
2765  auto r = t->rawSlice(a[0], a[1]); \
2766  t->copyIndexBindings(r); \
2767  r.bindInternalIndicesTo(t); \
2768  return r; \
2769  } \
2770  \
2771  bool setCurrentRaw(o2::soa::Binding current) \
2772  { \
2773  this->mBinding = current; \
2774  return true; \
2775  } \
2776  o2::soa::Binding getCurrentRaw() const { return mBinding; } \
2777  o2::soa::Binding mBinding; \
2778  };
2779 
2780 #define DECLARE_SOA_SELF_SLICE_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Label_) DECLARE_SOA_SELF_SLICE_INDEX_COLUMN_COMPLETE(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Label_, void)
2781 #define DECLARE_SOA_SELF_SLICE_INDEX_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_) DECLARE_SOA_SELF_SLICE_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, int32_t, "_" #_Name_)
2783 #define DECLARE_SOA_SELF_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN_COMPLETE(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Label_, _IndexTarget_) \
2784  struct _Name_##Ids : o2::soa::Column<std::vector<_Type_>, _Name_##Ids> { \
2785  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<_Type_>, "Index type must be integral"); \
2786  static constexpr const char* mLabel = "fIndexArray" _Label_; \
2787  using base = o2::soa::Column<std::vector<_Type_>, _Name_##Ids>; \
2788  using type = std::vector<_Type_>; \
2789  using column_t = _Name_##Ids; \
2790  using self_index_t = std::true_type; \
2791  using compatible_signature = std::conditional<aod::is_aod_hash<_IndexTarget_>, _IndexTarget_, void>; \
2792  _Name_##Ids(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column) \
2793  : o2::soa::Column<std::vector<_Type_>, _Name_##Ids>(o2::soa::ColumnIterator<type>(column)) \
2794  { \
2795  } \
2796  \
2797  _Name_##Ids() = default; \
2798  _Name_##Ids(_Name_##Ids const& other) = default; \
2799  _Name_##Ids& operator=(_Name_##Ids const& other) = default; \
2800  gsl::span<const _Type_> inline getIds() const \
2801  { \
2802  return _Getter_##Ids(); \
2803  } \
2804  \
2805  gsl::span<const _Type_> _Getter_##Ids() const \
2806  { \
2807  return *mColumnIterator; \
2808  } \
2809  \
2810  bool has_##_Getter_() const \
2811  { \
2812  return !(*mColumnIterator).empty(); \
2813  } \
2814  \
2815  template <typename T> \
2816  auto _Getter_##_as() const \
2817  { \
2818  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2819  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2820  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2821  } \
2822  return getIterators<T>(); \
2823  } \
2824  \
2825  template <typename T> \
2826  auto getIterators() const \
2827  { \
2828  auto result = std::vector<typename T::unfiltered_iterator>(); \
2829  for (auto& i : *mColumnIterator) { \
2830  result.push_back(mBinding.get<T>()->rawIteratorAt(i)); \
2831  } \
2832  return result; \
2833  } \
2834  \
2835  template <typename T> \
2836  auto _Getter_##_first_as() const \
2837  { \
2838  return mBinding.get<T>()->rawIteratorAt((*mColumnIterator)[0]); \
2839  } \
2840  \
2841  template <typename T> \
2842  auto _Getter_##_last_as() const \
2843  { \
2844  return mBinding.get<T>()->rawIteratorAt((*mColumnIterator).back()); \
2845  } \
2846  \
2847  bool setCurrentRaw(o2::soa::Binding current) \
2848  { \
2849  this->mBinding = current; \
2850  return true; \
2851  } \
2852  o2::soa::Binding getCurrentRaw() const { return mBinding; } \
2853  o2::soa::Binding mBinding; \
2854  };
2855 
2856 #define DECLARE_SOA_SELF_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Label_) DECLARE_SOA_SELF_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN_COMPLETE(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Label_, void)
2857 #define DECLARE_SOA_SELF_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_) DECLARE_SOA_SELF_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, int32_t, "_" #_Name_)
2858 
2887 #define DECLARE_SOA_DYNAMIC_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_, ...) \
2888  struct _Name_##Callback { \
2889  static inline constexpr auto getLambda() { return __VA_ARGS__; } \
2890  }; \
2891  \
2892  struct _Name_##Helper { \
2893  using callable_t = decltype(o2::framework::FunctionMetadata(std::declval<decltype(_Name_##Callback::getLambda())>())); \
2894  using return_type = typename callable_t::return_type; \
2895  }; \
2896  template <typename... Bindings> \
2897  struct _Name_ : o2::soa::DynamicColumn<typename _Name_##Helper::callable_t::type, _Name_<Bindings...>> { \
2898  using base = o2::soa::DynamicColumn<typename _Name_##Helper::callable_t::type, _Name_<Bindings...>>; \
2899  using helper = _Name_##Helper; \
2900  using callback_holder_t = _Name_##Callback; \
2901  using callable_t = helper::callable_t; \
2902  using callback_t = callable_t::type; \
2903  \
2904  _Name_(arrow::ChunkedArray const*) \
2905  { \
2906  } \
2907  _Name_() = default; \
2908  _Name_(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
2909  _Name_& operator=(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
2910  static constexpr const char* mLabel = #_Name_; \
2911  using type = typename callable_t::return_type; \
2912  \
2913  template <typename... FreeArgs> \
2914  type _Getter_(FreeArgs... freeArgs) const \
2915  { \
2916  return boundGetter(std::make_index_sequence<std::tuple_size_v<decltype(boundIterators)>>{}, freeArgs...); \
2917  } \
2918  template <typename... FreeArgs> \
2919  type getDynamicValue(FreeArgs... freeArgs) const \
2920  { \
2921  return boundGetter(std::make_index_sequence<std::tuple_size_v<decltype(boundIterators)>>{}, freeArgs...); \
2922  } \
2923  \
2924  type get() const \
2925  { \
2926  return _Getter_(); \
2927  } \
2928  \
2929  template <size_t... Is, typename... FreeArgs> \
2930  type boundGetter(std::integer_sequence<size_t, Is...>&&, FreeArgs... freeArgs) const \
2931  { \
2932  return __VA_ARGS__((**std::get<Is>(boundIterators))..., freeArgs...); \
2933  } \
2934  \
2935  using bindings_t = typename o2::framework::pack<Bindings...>; \
2936  std::tuple<o2::soa::ColumnIterator<typename Bindings::type> const*...> boundIterators; \
2937  }
2938 
2939 #define DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_METADATA(_Name_, _Desc_, _Version_, ...) \
2940  using _Name_##Metadata = TableMetadata<Hash<_Desc_ "/" #_Version_ ""_h>, __VA_ARGS__>;
2941 
2942 #define DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_METADATA_TRAIT(_Name_, _Desc_, _Version_) \
2943  template <> \
2944  struct MetadataTrait<Hash<_Desc_ "/" #_Version_ ""_h>> { \
2945  using metadata = _Name_##Metadata; \
2946  };
2947 
2948 #define DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_FULL_VERSIONED_(_Name_, _Label_, _Origin_, _Desc_, _Version_) \
2949  O2HASH(_Desc_ "/" #_Version_); \
2950  template <typename O> \
2951  using _Name_##From = o2::soa::Table<Hash<_Label_ ""_h>, Hash<_Desc_ "/" #_Version_ ""_h>, O>; \
2952  using _Name_ = _Name_##From<Hash<_Origin_ ""_h>>; \
2953  template <> \
2954  struct MetadataTrait<Hash<_Desc_ "/" #_Version_ ""_h>> { \
2955  using metadata = _Name_##Metadata; \
2956  };
2957 
2958 #define DECLARE_SOA_STAGE(_Name_, _Origin_, _Desc_, _Version_) \
2959  template <typename O> \
2960  using _Name_##From = o2::soa::Table<Hash<#_Name_ ""_h>, Hash<_Desc_ "/" #_Version_ ""_h>, O>; \
2961  using _Name_ = _Name_##From<Hash<_Origin_ ""_h>>;
2962 
2963 #define DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_FULL_VERSIONED(_Name_, _Label_, _Origin_, _Desc_, _Version_, ...) \
2964  DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_METADATA(_Name_, _Desc_, _Version_, __VA_ARGS__); \
2965  DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_FULL_VERSIONED_(_Name_, _Label_, _Origin_, _Desc_, _Version_);
2966 
2967 #define DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Label_, _Origin_, _Desc_, ...) \
2968  O2HASH(_Label_); \
2969  DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_METADATA(_Name_, _Desc_, 0, __VA_ARGS__); \
2970  DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_FULL_VERSIONED_(_Name_, _Label_, _Origin_, _Desc_, 0)
2971 
2972 #define DECLARE_SOA_TABLE(_Name_, _Origin_, _Desc_, ...) \
2973  DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, #_Name_, _Origin_, _Desc_, __VA_ARGS__)
2974 
2975 #define DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_VERSIONED(_Name_, _Origin_, _Desc_, _Version_, ...) \
2976  O2HASH(#_Name_); \
2977  DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_METADATA(_Name_, _Desc_, _Version_, __VA_ARGS__); \
2978  DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_FULL_VERSIONED_(_Name_, #_Name_, _Origin_, _Desc_, _Version_)
2979 
2980 #define DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_STAGED_VERSIONED(_BaseName_, _Desc_, _Version_, ...) \
2981  O2HASH(_Desc_ "/" #_Version_); \
2982  O2HASH(#_BaseName_); \
2983  O2HASH("Stored" #_BaseName_); \
2984  DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_METADATA(_BaseName_, _Desc_, _Version_, __VA_ARGS__); \
2985  using Stored##_BaseName_##Metadata = _BaseName_##Metadata; \
2986  DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_METADATA_TRAIT(_BaseName_, _Desc_, _Version_); \
2987  DECLARE_SOA_STAGE(_BaseName_, "AOD", _Desc_, _Version_); \
2988  DECLARE_SOA_STAGE(Stored##_BaseName_, "AOD1", _Desc_, _Version_);
2989 
2990 #define DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_STAGED(_BaseName_, _Desc_, ...) \
2991  DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_STAGED_VERSIONED(_BaseName_, _Desc_, 0, __VA_ARGS__);
2992 
2993 #define DECLARE_SOA_EXTENDED_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Label_, _OriginalTable_, _Origin_, _Desc_, _Version_, ...) \
2994  O2HASH(_Desc_ "/" #_Version_); \
2995  template <typename O> \
2996  using _Name_##ExtensionFrom = soa::Table<o2::aod::Hash<_Label_ ""_h>, o2::aod::Hash<_Desc_ "/" #_Version_ ""_h>, O>; \
2997  using _Name_##Extension = _Name_##ExtensionFrom<o2::aod::Hash<_Origin_ ""_h>>; \
2998  template <typename O = o2::aod::Hash<_Origin_ ""_h>> \
2999  struct _Name_##ExtensionMetadataFrom : TableMetadata<o2::aod::Hash<_Desc_ "/" #_Version_ ""_h>, __VA_ARGS__> { \
3000  using base_table_t = _OriginalTable_; \
3001  using extension_table_t = _Name_##ExtensionFrom<O>; \
3002  using expression_pack_t = framework::pack<__VA_ARGS__>; \
3003  static constexpr auto sources = _OriginalTable_::originals; \
3004  }; \
3005  using _Name_##ExtensionMetadata = _Name_##ExtensionMetadataFrom<o2::aod::Hash<_Origin_ ""_h>>; \
3006  template <> \
3007  struct MetadataTrait<o2::aod::Hash<_Desc_ "/" #_Version_ ""_h>> { \
3008  using metadata = _Name_##ExtensionMetadata; \
3009  }; \
3010  template <typename O> \
3011  using _Name_##From = o2::soa::JoinFull<o2::aod::Hash<_Desc_ "/" #_Version_ ""_h>, _OriginalTable_, _Name_##ExtensionFrom<O>>; \
3012  using _Name_ = _Name_##From<o2::aod::Hash<_Origin_ ""_h>>;
3013 
3014 #define DECLARE_SOA_EXTENDED_TABLE(_Name_, _Table_, _Description_, _Version_, ...) \
3015  O2HASH(#_Name_ "Extension"); \
3016  DECLARE_SOA_EXTENDED_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, #_Name_ "Extension", _Table_, "DYN", _Description_, _Version_, __VA_ARGS__)
3017 
3018 #define DECLARE_SOA_EXTENDED_TABLE_USER(_Name_, _Table_, _Description_, ...) \
3019  O2HASH(#_Name_ "Extension"); \
3020  DECLARE_SOA_EXTENDED_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, #_Name_ "Extension", _Table_, "AOD", "EX" _Description_, 0, __VA_ARGS__)
3021 
3022 #define DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Key_, _Origin_, _Version_, _Desc_, _Exclusive_, ...) \
3023  O2HASH(#_Name_); \
3024  O2HASH(_Desc_ "/" #_Version_); \
3025  template <typename O = o2::aod::Hash<_Origin_ ""_h>> \
3026  struct _Name_##MetadataFrom : o2::aod::TableMetadata<o2::aod::Hash<_Desc_ "/" #_Version_ ""_h>, soa::Index<>, __VA_ARGS__> { \
3027  static constexpr bool exclusive = _Exclusive_; \
3028  using Key = _Key_; \
3029  using index_pack_t = framework::pack<__VA_ARGS__>; \
3030  static constexpr const auto sources = []<typename... Cs>(framework::pack<Cs...>) { \
3031  constexpr auto a = o2::soa::mergeOriginals<typename Cs::binding_t...>(); \
3032  return o2::aod::filterForKey<a.size(), a, Key>(); \
3033  }(framework::pack<__VA_ARGS__>{}); \
3034  }; \
3035  using _Name_##Metadata = _Name_##MetadataFrom<o2::aod::Hash<_Origin_ ""_h>>; \
3036  \
3037  template <typename O = o2::aod::Hash<_Origin_ ""_h>> \
3038  using _Name_##From = o2::soa::IndexTable<o2::aod::Hash<#_Name_ ""_h>, o2::aod::Hash<_Desc_ "/" #_Version_ ""_h>, O, _Key_, __VA_ARGS__>; \
3039  using _Name_ = _Name_##From<o2::aod::Hash<_Origin_ ""_h>>; \
3040  \
3041  template <> \
3042  struct MetadataTrait<o2::aod::Hash<_Desc_ "/" #_Version_ ""_h>> { \
3043  using metadata = _Name_##Metadata; \
3044  };
3045 
3046 #define DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE(_Name_, _Key_, _Description_, ...) \
3047  DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Key_, "IDX", 0, _Description_, false, __VA_ARGS__)
3048 
3049 #define DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_EXCLUSIVE(_Name_, _Key_, _Description_, ...) \
3050  DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Key_, "IDX", 0, _Description_, true, __VA_ARGS__)
3051 
3052 #define DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_USER(_Name_, _Key_, _Description_, ...) \
3053  DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Key_, "AOD", 0, _Description_, false, __VA_ARGS__)
3054 
3055 #define DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_EXCLUSIVE_USER(_Name_, _Key_, _Description_, ...) \
3056  DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Key_, "AOD", 0, _Description_, true, __VA_ARGS__)
3057 
3058 namespace o2::soa
3059 {
3060 template <typename D, typename... Ts>
3061 struct JoinFull : Table<o2::aod::Hash<"JOIN"_h>, D, o2::aod::Hash<"JOIN"_h>, Ts...> {
3062  using base = Table<o2::aod::Hash<"JOIN"_h>, D, o2::aod::Hash<"JOIN"_h>, Ts...>;
3063 
3064  JoinFull(std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>&& table, uint64_t offset = 0)
3065  : base{std::move(table), offset}
3066  {
3067  bindInternalIndicesTo(this);
3068  }
3069  JoinFull(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, uint64_t offset = 0)
3070  : base{ArrowHelpers::joinTables(std::move(tables)), offset}
3071  {
3072  bindInternalIndicesTo(this);
3073  }
3074  using base::bindExternalIndices;
3075  using base::bindInternalIndicesTo;
3076 
3077  using self_t = JoinFull<D, Ts...>;
3078  using table_t = base;
3079  static constexpr const auto originals = base::originals;
3080  using columns_t = typename table_t::columns_t;
3081  using persistent_columns_t = typename table_t::persistent_columns_t;
3082  using iterator = table_t::template iterator_template<DefaultIndexPolicy, self_t, Ts...>;
3083  using const_iterator = iterator;
3084  using unfiltered_iterator = iterator;
3085  using unfiltered_const_iterator = const_iterator;
3086  using filtered_iterator = table_t::template iterator_template<FilteredIndexPolicy, self_t, Ts...>;
3087  using filtered_const_iterator = filtered_iterator;
3088 
3089  iterator begin()
3090  {
3091  return iterator{this->cached_begin()};
3092  }
3093 
3094  const_iterator begin() const
3095  {
3096  return const_iterator{this->cached_begin()};
3097  }
3098 
3099  auto sliceByCached(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
3100  {
3101  return doSliceByCached(this, node, value, cache);
3102  }
3103 
3104  auto sliceByCachedUnsorted(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
3105  {
3106  return doSliceByCachedUnsorted(this, node, value, cache);
3107  }
3108 
3109  template <typename T1, bool OPT, bool SORTED>
3110  auto sliceBy(o2::framework::PresliceBase<T1, OPT, SORTED> const& container, int value) const
3111  {
3112  return doSliceBy(this, container, value);
3113  }
3114 
3115  iterator rawIteratorAt(uint64_t i) const
3116  {
3117  auto it = iterator{this->cached_begin()};
3118  it.setCursor(i);
3119  return it;
3120  }
3121 
3122  iterator iteratorAt(uint64_t i) const
3123  {
3124  return rawIteratorAt(i);
3125  }
3126 
3127  auto rawSlice(uint64_t start, uint64_t end) const
3128  {
3129  return self_t{{this->asArrowTable()->Slice(start, end - start + 1)}, start};
3130  }
3131 
3132  auto emptySlice() const
3133  {
3134  return self_t{{this->asArrowTable()->Slice(0, 0)}, 0};
3135  }
3136 
3137  template <typename T>
3138  static consteval bool contains()
3139  {
3140  return std::find_if(originals.begin(), originals.end(), [](TableRef const& ref) { return ref.desc_hash == T::ref.desc_hash; }) != originals.end();
3141  }
3142 };
3143 
3144 template <typename... Ts>
3145 using Join = JoinFull<o2::aod::Hash<"JOIN/0"_h>, Ts...>;
3146 
3147 template <typename... Ts>
3148 constexpr auto join(Ts const&... t)
3149 {
3150  return Join<Ts...>(ArrowHelpers::joinTables({t.asArrowTable()...}));
3151 }
3152 
3153 template <typename T>
3154 concept is_join = framework::specialization_of_template<JoinFull, T>;
3155 
3156 template <typename T>
3157 constexpr bool is_soa_join_v = is_join<T>;
3158 
3159 template <typename... Ts>
3160 struct Concat : Table<o2::aod::Hash<"CONC"_h>, o2::aod::Hash<"CONC/0"_h>, o2::aod::Hash<"CONC"_h>, Ts...> {
3161  using base = Table<o2::aod::Hash<"CONC"_h>, o2::aod::Hash<"CONC/0"_h>, o2::aod::Hash<"CONC"_h>, Ts...>;
3162  using self_t = Concat<Ts...>;
3163  Concat(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, uint64_t offset = 0)
3164  : base{ArrowHelpers::concatTables(std::move(tables)), offset}
3165  {
3166  bindInternalIndicesTo(this);
3167  }
3168  Concat(Ts const&... t, uint64_t offset = 0)
3169  : base{ArrowHelpers::concatTables({t.asArrowTable()...}), offset}
3170  {
3171  bindInternalIndicesTo(this);
3172  }
3173 
3174  using base::originals;
3175 
3176  using base::bindExternalIndices;
3177  using base::bindInternalIndicesTo;
3178 
3179  using table_t = base;
3180  using columns_t = typename table_t::columns_t;
3181  using persistent_columns_t = typename table_t::persistent_columns_t;
3182 
3183  using iterator = table_t::template iterator_template<DefaultIndexPolicy, self_t, Ts...>;
3184  using const_iterator = iterator;
3185  using unfiltered_iterator = iterator;
3186  using unfiltered_const_iterator = const_iterator;
3187  using filtered_iterator = table_t::template iterator_template<FilteredIndexPolicy, self_t, Ts...>;
3188  using filtered_const_iterator = filtered_iterator;
3189 };
3190 
3191 template <typename... Ts>
3192 constexpr auto concat(Ts const&... t)
3193 {
3194  return Concat<Ts...>{t...};
3195 }
3196 
3197 template <soa::is_table T>
3198 class FilteredBase : public T
3199 {
3200  public:
3201  using self_t = FilteredBase<T>;
3202  using table_t = typename T::table_t;
3203  using T::originals;
3204  using columns_t = typename T::columns_t;
3205  using persistent_columns_t = typename T::persistent_columns_t;
3206  using external_index_columns_t = typename T::external_index_columns_t;
3207 
3208  using iterator = T::template iterator_template_o<FilteredIndexPolicy, self_t>;
3209  using unfiltered_iterator = T::template iterator_template_o<DefaultIndexPolicy, self_t>;
3210  using const_iterator = iterator;
3211 
3212  FilteredBase(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, gandiva::Selection const& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3213  : T{std::move(tables), offset},
3214  mSelectedRows{getSpan(selection)}
3215  {
3216  if (this->tableSize() != 0) {
3217  mFilteredBegin = table_t::filtered_begin(mSelectedRows);
3218  }
3219  resetRanges();
3220  mFilteredBegin.bindInternalIndices(this);
3221  }
3222 
3223  FilteredBase(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, SelectionVector&& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3224  : T{std::move(tables), offset},
3225  mSelectedRowsCache{std::move(selection)},
3226  mCached{true}
3227  {
3228  mSelectedRows = gsl::span{mSelectedRowsCache};
3229  if (this->tableSize() != 0) {
3230  mFilteredBegin = table_t::filtered_begin(mSelectedRows);
3231  }
3232  resetRanges();
3233  mFilteredBegin.bindInternalIndices(this);
3234  }
3235 
3236  FilteredBase(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3237  : T{std::move(tables), offset},
3238  mSelectedRows{selection}
3239  {
3240  if (this->tableSize() != 0) {
3241  mFilteredBegin = table_t::filtered_begin(mSelectedRows);
3242  }
3243  resetRanges();
3244  mFilteredBegin.bindInternalIndices(this);
3245  }
3246 
3247  iterator begin()
3248  {
3249  return iterator(mFilteredBegin);
3250  }
3251 
3252  const_iterator begin() const
3253  {
3254  return const_iterator(mFilteredBegin);
3255  }
3256 
3257  unfiltered_iterator rawIteratorAt(uint64_t i) const
3258  {
3259  auto it = unfiltered_iterator{mFilteredBegin};
3260  it.setCursor(i);
3261  return it;
3262  }
3263 
3264  [[nodiscard]] RowViewSentinel end() const
3265  {
3266  return RowViewSentinel{*mFilteredEnd};
3267  }
3268 
3269  auto& cached_begin()
3270  {
3271  return mFilteredBegin;
3272  }
3273 
3274  auto const& cached_begin() const
3275  {
3276  return mFilteredBegin;
3277  }
3278 
3279  iterator iteratorAt(uint64_t i) const
3280  {
3281  return mFilteredBegin + i;
3282  }
3283 
3284  [[nodiscard]] int64_t size() const
3285  {
3286  return mSelectedRows.size();
3287  }
3288 
3289  [[nodiscard]] int64_t tableSize() const
3290  {
3291  return table_t::asArrowTable()->num_rows();
3292  }
3293 
3294  auto const& getSelectedRows() const
3295  {
3296  return mSelectedRows;
3297  }
3298 
3299  auto rawSlice(uint64_t start, uint64_t end) const
3300  {
3301  SelectionVector newSelection;
3302  newSelection.resize(static_cast<int64_t>(end - start + 1));
3303  std::iota(newSelection.begin(), newSelection.end(), start);
3304  return self_t{{this->asArrowTable()}, std::move(newSelection), 0};
3305  }
3306 
3307  auto emptySlice() const
3308  {
3309  return self_t{{this->asArrowTable()}, SelectionVector{}, 0};
3310  }
3311 
3312  static inline auto getSpan(gandiva::Selection const& sel)
3313  {
3314  if (sel == nullptr) {
3315  return gsl::span<int64_t const>{};
3316  }
3317  auto array = std::static_pointer_cast<arrow::Int64Array>(sel->ToArray());
3318  auto start = array->raw_values();
3319  auto stop = start + array->length();
3320  return gsl::span{start, stop};
3321  }
3322 
3325  template <typename... TA>
3326  void bindExternalIndices(TA*... current)
3327  {
3328  table_t::bindExternalIndices(current...);
3329  mFilteredBegin.bindExternalIndices(current...);
3330  }
3331 
3332  void bindExternalIndicesRaw(std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>&& ptrs)
3333  {
3334  mFilteredBegin.bindExternalIndicesRaw(std::forward<std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>>(ptrs));
3335  }
3336 
3337  template <typename I>
3338  void bindInternalIndicesTo(I const* ptr)
3339  {
3340  mFilteredBegin.bindInternalIndices(ptr);
3341  }
3342 
3343  template <typename T1, typename... Cs>
3344  void doCopyIndexBindings(framework::pack<Cs...>, T1& dest) const
3345  {
3346  dest.bindExternalIndicesRaw(mFilteredBegin.getIndexBindings());
3347  }
3348 
3349  template <typename T1>
3350  void copyIndexBindings(T1& dest) const
3351  {
3352  doCopyIndexBindings(external_index_columns_t{}, dest);
3353  }
3354 
3355  template <typename T1>
3356  auto rawSliceBy(o2::framework::Preslice<T1> const& container, int value) const
3357  {
3358  return (table_t)this->sliceBy(container, value);
3359  }
3360 
3361  auto sliceByCached(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
3362  {
3363  return doFilteredSliceByCached(this, node, value, cache);
3364  }
3365 
3366  auto sliceByCachedUnsorted(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
3367  {
3368  return doSliceByCachedUnsorted(this, node, value, cache);
3369  }
3370 
3371  template <typename T1, bool OPT, bool SORTED>
3372  auto sliceBy(o2::framework::PresliceBase<T1, OPT, SORTED> const& container, int value) const
3373  {
3374  if constexpr (SORTED) {
3375  return doFilteredSliceBy(this, container, value);
3376  } else {
3377  return doSliceBy(this, container, value);
3378  }
3379  }
3380 
3381  auto select(framework::expressions::Filter const& f) const
3382  {
3383  auto t = o2::soa::select(*this, f);
3384  copyIndexBindings(t);
3385  return t;
3386  }
3387 
3388  int isInSelectedRows(int i) const
3389  {
3390  auto locate = std::find(mSelectedRows.begin(), mSelectedRows.end(), i);
3391  if (locate == mSelectedRows.end()) {
3392  return -1;
3393  }
3394  return static_cast<int>(std::distance(mSelectedRows.begin(), locate));
3395  }
3396 
3397  void sumWithSelection(SelectionVector const& selection)
3398  {
3399  mCached = true;
3400  SelectionVector rowsUnion;
3401  std::set_union(mSelectedRows.begin(), mSelectedRows.end(), selection.begin(), selection.end(), std::back_inserter(rowsUnion));
3402  mSelectedRowsCache.clear();
3403  mSelectedRowsCache = rowsUnion;
3404  resetRanges();
3405  }
3406 
3407  void intersectWithSelection(SelectionVector const& selection)
3408  {
3409  mCached = true;
3410  SelectionVector intersection;
3411  std::set_intersection(mSelectedRows.begin(), mSelectedRows.end(), selection.begin(), selection.end(), std::back_inserter(intersection));
3412  mSelectedRowsCache.clear();
3413  mSelectedRowsCache = intersection;
3414  resetRanges();
3415  }
3416 
3417  void sumWithSelection(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3418  {
3419  mCached = true;
3420  SelectionVector rowsUnion;
3421  std::set_union(mSelectedRows.begin(), mSelectedRows.end(), selection.begin(), selection.end(), std::back_inserter(rowsUnion));
3422  mSelectedRowsCache.clear();
3423  mSelectedRowsCache = rowsUnion;
3424  resetRanges();
3425  }
3426 
3427  void intersectWithSelection(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3428  {
3429  mCached = true;
3430  SelectionVector intersection;
3431  std::set_intersection(mSelectedRows.begin(), mSelectedRows.end(), selection.begin(), selection.end(), std::back_inserter(intersection));
3432  mSelectedRowsCache.clear();
3433  mSelectedRowsCache = intersection;
3434  resetRanges();
3435  }
3436 
3437  bool isCached() const
3438  {
3439  return mCached;
3440  }
3441 
3442  private:
3443  void resetRanges()
3444  {
3445  if (mCached) {
3446  mSelectedRows = gsl::span{mSelectedRowsCache};
3447  }
3448  mFilteredEnd.reset(new RowViewSentinel{static_cast<int64_t>(mSelectedRows.size())});
3449  if (tableSize() == 0) {
3450  mFilteredBegin = *mFilteredEnd;
3451  } else {
3452  mFilteredBegin.resetSelection(mSelectedRows);
3453  }
3454  }
3455 
3456  gsl::span<int64_t const> mSelectedRows;
3457  SelectionVector mSelectedRowsCache;
3458  bool mCached = false;
3459  iterator mFilteredBegin;
3460  std::shared_ptr<RowViewSentinel> mFilteredEnd;
3461 };
3462 
3463 template <typename T>
3464 class Filtered : public FilteredBase<T>
3465 {
3466  public:
3467  using base_t = T;
3468  using self_t = Filtered<T>;
3469  using table_t = typename T::table_t;
3470  using columns_t = typename T::columns_t;
3471 
3472  using iterator = T::template iterator_template_o<FilteredIndexPolicy, self_t>;
3473  using unfiltered_iterator = T::template iterator_template_o<DefaultIndexPolicy, self_t>;
3474  using const_iterator = iterator;
3475 
3476  iterator begin()
3477  {
3478  return iterator(this->cached_begin());
3479  }
3480 
3481  const_iterator begin() const
3482  {
3483  return const_iterator(this->cached_begin());
3484  }
3485 
3486  Filtered(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, gandiva::Selection const& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3487  : FilteredBase<T>(std::move(tables), selection, offset) {}
3488 
3489  Filtered(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, SelectionVector&& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3490  : FilteredBase<T>(std::move(tables), std::forward<SelectionVector>(selection), offset) {}
3491 
3492  Filtered(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3493  : FilteredBase<T>(std::move(tables), selection, offset) {}
3494 
3495  Filtered<T> operator+(SelectionVector const& selection)
3496  {
3497  Filtered<T> copy(*this);
3498  copy.sumWithSelection(selection);
3499  return copy;
3500  }
3501 
3502  Filtered<T> operator+(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3503  {
3504  Filtered<T> copy(*this);
3505  copy.sumWithSelection(selection);
3506  return copy;
3507  }
3508 
3509  Filtered<T> operator+(Filtered<T> const& other)
3510  {
3511  return operator+(other.getSelectedRows());
3512  }
3513 
3514  Filtered<T> operator+=(SelectionVector const& selection)
3515  {
3516  this->sumWithSelection(selection);
3517  return *this;
3518  }
3519 
3520  Filtered<T> operator+=(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3521  {
3522  this->sumWithSelection(selection);
3523  return *this;
3524  }
3525 
3526  Filtered<T> operator+=(Filtered<T> const& other)
3527  {
3528  return operator+=(other.getSelectedRows());
3529  }
3530 
3531  Filtered<T> operator*(SelectionVector const& selection)
3532  {
3533  Filtered<T> copy(*this);
3534  copy.intersectWithSelection(selection);
3535  return copy;
3536  }
3537 
3538  Filtered<T> operator*(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3539  {
3540  Filtered<T> copy(*this);
3541  copy.intersectWithSelection(selection);
3542  return copy;
3543  }
3544 
3545  Filtered<T> operator*(Filtered<T> const& other)
3546  {
3547  return operator*(other.getSelectedRows());
3548  }
3549 
3550  Filtered<T> operator*=(SelectionVector const& selection)
3551  {
3552  this->intersectWithSelection(selection);
3553  return *this;
3554  }
3555 
3556  Filtered<T> operator*=(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3557  {
3558  this->intersectWithSelection(selection);
3559  return *this;
3560  }
3561 
3562  Filtered<T> operator*=(Filtered<T> const& other)
3563  {
3564  return operator*=(other.getSelectedRows());
3565  }
3566 
3567  unfiltered_iterator rawIteratorAt(uint64_t i) const
3568  {
3569  auto it = unfiltered_iterator{this->cached_begin()};
3570  it.setCursor(i);
3571  return it;
3572  }
3573 
3574  using FilteredBase<T>::getSelectedRows;
3575 
3576  auto rawSlice(uint64_t start, uint64_t end) const
3577  {
3578  SelectionVector newSelection;
3579  newSelection.resize(static_cast<int64_t>(end - start + 1));
3580  std::iota(newSelection.begin(), newSelection.end(), start);
3581  return self_t{{this->asArrowTable()}, std::move(newSelection), 0};
3582  }
3583 
3584  auto emptySlice() const
3585  {
3586  return self_t{{this->asArrowTable()}, SelectionVector{}, 0};
3587  }
3588 
3589  template <typename T1>
3590  auto rawSliceBy(o2::framework::Preslice<T1> const& container, int value) const
3591  {
3592  return (table_t)this->sliceBy(container, value);
3593  }
3594 
3595  auto sliceByCached(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
3596  {
3597  return doFilteredSliceByCached(this, node, value, cache);
3598  }
3599 
3600  auto sliceByCachedUnsorted(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
3601  {
3602  return doSliceByCachedUnsorted(this, node, value, cache);
3603  }
3604 
3605  template <typename T1, bool OPT, bool SORTED>
3606  auto sliceBy(o2::framework::PresliceBase<T1, OPT, SORTED> const& container, int value) const
3607  {
3608  if constexpr (SORTED) {
3609  return doFilteredSliceBy(this, container, value);
3610  } else {
3611  return doSliceBy(this, container, value);
3612  }
3613  }
3614 
3615  auto select(framework::expressions::Filter const& f) const
3616  {
3617  auto t = o2::soa::select(*this, f);
3618  copyIndexBindings(t);
3619  return t;
3620  }
3621 };
3622 
3623 template <typename T>
3624 class Filtered<Filtered<T>> : public FilteredBase<typename T::table_t>
3625 {
3626  public:
3627  using self_t = Filtered<Filtered<T>>;
3628  using base_t = T;
3629  using table_t = typename FilteredBase<typename T::table_t>::table_t;
3630  using columns_t = typename T::columns_t;
3631 
3632  using iterator = typename T::template iterator_template_o<FilteredIndexPolicy, self_t>;
3633  using unfiltered_iterator = typename T::template iterator_template_o<DefaultIndexPolicy, self_t>;
3634  using const_iterator = iterator;
3635 
3636  iterator begin()
3637  {
3638  return iterator(this->cached_begin());
3639  }
3640 
3641  const_iterator begin() const
3642  {
3643  return const_iterator(this->cached_begin());
3644  }
3645 
3646  Filtered(std::vector<Filtered<T>>&& tables, gandiva::Selection const& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3647  : FilteredBase<typename T::table_t>(std::move(extractTablesFromFiltered(tables)), selection, offset)
3648  {
3649  for (auto& table : tables) {
3650  *this *= table;
3651  }
3652  }
3653 
3654  Filtered(std::vector<Filtered<T>>&& tables, SelectionVector&& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3655  : FilteredBase<typename T::table_t>(std::move(extractTablesFromFiltered(tables)), std::forward<SelectionVector>(selection), offset)
3656  {
3657  for (auto& table : tables) {
3658  *this *= table;
3659  }
3660  }
3661 
3662  Filtered(std::vector<Filtered<T>>&& tables, gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3663  : FilteredBase<typename T::table_t>(std::move(extractTablesFromFiltered(tables)), selection, offset)
3664  {
3665  for (auto& table : tables) {
3666  *this *= table;
3667  }
3668  }
3669 
3670  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator+(SelectionVector const& selection)
3671  {
3672  Filtered<Filtered<T>> copy(*this);
3673  copy.sumWithSelection(selection);
3674  return copy;
3675  }
3676 
3677  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator+(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3678  {
3679  Filtered<Filtered<T>> copy(*this);
3680  copy.sumWithSelection(selection);
3681  return copy;
3682  }
3683 
3684  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator+(Filtered<T> const& other)
3685  {
3686  return operator+(other.getSelectedRows());
3687  }
3688 
3689  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator+=(SelectionVector const& selection)
3690  {
3691  this->sumWithSelection(selection);
3692  return *this;
3693  }
3694 
3695  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator+=(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3696  {
3697  this->sumWithSelection(selection);
3698  return *this;
3699  }
3700 
3701  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator+=(Filtered<T> const& other)
3702  {
3703  return operator+=(other.getSelectedRows());
3704  }
3705 
3706  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator*(SelectionVector const& selection)
3707  {
3708  Filtered<Filtered<T>> copy(*this);
3709  copy.intersectionWithSelection(selection);
3710  return copy;
3711  }
3712 
3713  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator*(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3714  {
3715  Filtered<Filtered<T>> copy(*this);
3716  copy.intersectionWithSelection(selection);
3717  return copy;
3718  }
3719 
3720  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator*(Filtered<T> const& other)
3721  {
3722  return operator*(other.getSelectedRows());
3723  }
3724 
3725  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator*=(SelectionVector const& selection)
3726  {
3727  this->intersectWithSelection(selection);
3728  return *this;
3729  }
3730 
3731  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator*=(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3732  {
3733  this->intersectWithSelection(selection);
3734  return *this;
3735  }
3736 
3737  Filtered<Filtered<T>> operator*=(Filtered<T> const& other)
3738  {
3739  return operator*=(other.getSelectedRows());
3740  }
3741 
3742  unfiltered_iterator rawIteratorAt(uint64_t i) const
3743  {
3744  auto it = unfiltered_iterator{this->cached_begin()};
3745  it.setCursor(i);
3746  return it;
3747  }
3748 
3749  auto rawSlice(uint64_t start, uint64_t end) const
3750  {
3751  SelectionVector newSelection;
3752  newSelection.resize(static_cast<int64_t>(end - start + 1));
3753  std::iota(newSelection.begin(), newSelection.end(), start);
3754  return self_t{{this->asArrowTable()}, std::move(newSelection), 0};
3755  }
3756 
3757  auto emptySlice() const
3758  {
3759  return self_t{{this->asArrowTable()}, SelectionVector{}, 0};
3760  }
3761 
3762  auto sliceByCached(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
3763  {
3764  return doFilteredSliceByCached(this, node, value, cache);
3765  }
3766 
3767  auto sliceByCachedUnsorted(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
3768  {
3769  return doSliceByCachedUnsorted(this, node, value, cache);
3770  }
3771 
3772  template <typename T1, bool OPT, bool SORTED>
3773  auto sliceBy(o2::framework::PresliceBase<T1, OPT, SORTED> const& container, int value) const
3774  {
3775  if constexpr (SORTED) {
3776  return doFilteredSliceBy(this, container, value);
3777  } else {
3778  return doSliceBy(this, container, value);
3779  }
3780  }
3781 
3782  private:
3783  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>> extractTablesFromFiltered(std::vector<Filtered<T>>& tables)
3784  {
3785  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>> outTables;
3786  for (auto& table : tables) {
3787  outTables.push_back(table.asArrowTable());
3788  }
3789  return outTables;
3790  }
3791 };
3792 
3798 template <typename L, typename D, typename O, typename Key, typename H, typename... Ts>
3799 struct IndexTable : Table<L, D, O> {
3800  using self_t = IndexTable<L, D, O, Key, H, Ts...>;
3801  using base_t = Table<L, D, O>;
3802  using table_t = base_t;
3803  using safe_base_t = Table<L, D, O>;
3804  using indexing_t = Key;
3805  using first_t = typename H::binding_t;
3806  using rest_t = framework::pack<typename Ts::binding_t...>;
3807 
3808  IndexTable(std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> table, uint64_t offset = 0)
3809  : base_t{table, offset}
3810  {
3811  }
3812 
3813  IndexTable(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>> tables, uint64_t offset = 0)
3814  : base_t{tables[0], offset}
3815  {
3816  }
3817 
3818  IndexTable(IndexTable const&) = default;
3819  IndexTable(IndexTable&&) = default;
3820  IndexTable& operator=(IndexTable const&) = default;
3821  IndexTable& operator=(IndexTable&&) = default;
3822 
3823  using iterator = typename base_t::template iterator_template_o<DefaultIndexPolicy, self_t>;
3824  using const_iterator = iterator;
3825  using filtered_iterator = typename base_t::template iterator_template_o<FilteredIndexPolicy, self_t>;
3826  using const_filtered_iterator = filtered_iterator;
3827 };
3828 
3829 template <typename T, bool APPLY>
3830 struct SmallGroupsBase : public Filtered<T> {
3831  static constexpr bool applyFilters = APPLY;
3832  SmallGroupsBase(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, gandiva::Selection const& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3833  : Filtered<T>(std::move(tables), selection, offset) {}
3834 
3835  SmallGroupsBase(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, SelectionVector&& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3836  : Filtered<T>(std::move(tables), std::forward<SelectionVector>(selection), offset) {}
3837 
3838  SmallGroupsBase(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3839  : Filtered<T>(std::move(tables), selection, offset) {}
3840 };
3841 
3842 template <typename T>
3843 using SmallGroups = SmallGroupsBase<T, true>;
3844 
3845 template <typename T>
3846 using SmallGroupsUnfiltered = SmallGroupsBase<T, false>;
3847 
3848 template <typename T>
3849 concept is_smallgroups = requires {
3850  []<typename B, bool A>(SmallGroupsBase<B, A>*) {}(std::declval<T*>());
3851 };
3852 } // namespace o2::soa
3853
